english: to cherish; to treasure; to use sparingly
exampleSimplified: 我们要爱惜粮食，不要浪费。
exampleTraditional: 我們要愛惜糧食，不要浪費。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào àixī liángshi, bùyào làngfèi.
exampleEnglish: We should cherish food and not waste it.

exampleSimplified: 她失去了工作，朋友们来安慰她。
exampleTraditional: 她失去了工作，朋友們來安慰她。
examplePinyin: Tā shīqù le gōngzuò, péngyoumen lái ānwèi tā.
exampleEnglish: She lost her job, and her friends came to comfort her.

exampleSimplified: 技术人员来安装新的设备。
exampleTraditional: 技術人員來安裝新的設備。
examplePinyin: Jìshù rényuán lái ānzhuāng xīn de shèbèi.
exampleEnglish: A technician came to install the new equipment.

exampleSimplified: 走廊里很暗，什么都看不清楚。
exampleTraditional: 走廊裡很暗，什麼都看不清楚。
examplePinyin: Zǒuláng lǐ hěn àn, shénme dōu kàn bù qīngchǔ.
exampleEnglish: The hallway is very dark; you can't see anything clearly.

english: to stay up late; to burn the midnight oil
exampleSimplified: 他为了完成报告熬夜到凌晨两点。
exampleTraditional: 他為了完成報告熬夜到凌晨兩點。
examplePinyin: Tā wèile wánchéng bàogào áoyè dào língchén liǎng diǎn.
exampleEnglish: He stayed up until 2 a.m. to finish the report.

english: to grasp; to seize; confidence; certainty
exampleSimplified: 你要把握住这次机会。
exampleTraditional: 你要把握住這次機會。
examplePinyin: Nǐ yào bǎwò zhù zhè cì jīhuì.
exampleEnglish: You must seize this opportunity.

english: to put; to place; to arrange; to display
exampleSimplified: 她把花摆在桌子上。
exampleTraditional: 她把花擺在桌子上。
examplePinyin: Tā bǎ huā bǎi zài zhuōzi shàng.
exampleEnglish: She placed the flowers on the table.

english: to handle; to manage; to deal with
exampleSimplified: 请到窗口办理相关手续。
exampleTraditional: 請到窗口辦理相關手續。
examplePinyin: Qǐng dào chuāngkǒu bànlǐ xiāngguān shǒuxù.
exampleEnglish: Please go to the window to handle the related procedures.

exampleSimplified: 傍晚时分，夕阳把天空染成橙红色。
exampleTraditional: 傍晚時分，夕陽把天空染成橙紅色。
examplePinyin: Bàngwǎn shífēn, xīyáng bǎ tiānkōng rǎn chéng chénghóng sè.
exampleEnglish: At dusk, the setting sun dyes the sky orange-red.

exampleSimplified: 出门旅行最好买旅游保险。
exampleTraditional: 出門旅行最好買旅遊保險。
examplePinyin: Chūmén lǚxíng zuìhǎo mǎi lǚyóu bǎoxiǎn.
exampleEnglish: It's best to buy travel insurance when going on a trip.

exampleSimplified: 我保证下次不会迟到。
exampleTraditional: 我保證下次不會遲到。
examplePinyin: Wǒ bǎozhèng xià cì bù huì chídào.
exampleEnglish: I guarantee I won't be late next time.

exampleSimplified: 时间是最宝贵的财富。
exampleTraditional: 時間是最寶貴的財富。
examplePinyin: Shíjiān shì zuì bǎoguì de cáifù.
exampleEnglish: Time is the most precious treasure.

exampleSimplified: 他总是抱怨工作太累。
exampleTraditional: 他總是抱怨工作太累。
examplePinyin: Tā zǒngshì bàoyuàn gōngzuò tài lèi.
exampleEnglish: He always complains that work is too tiring.

exampleSimplified: 不要悲观，事情会好起来的。
exampleTraditional: 不要悲觀，事情會好起來的。
examplePinyin: Bùyào bēiguān, shìqing huì hǎo qǐlai de.
exampleEnglish: Don't be pessimistic; things will get better.

english: after all; in the end; when all is said and done
exampleSimplified: 他毕竟还是个孩子，不要对他要求太高。
exampleTraditional: 他畢竟還是個孩子，不要對他要求太高。
examplePinyin: Tā bìjìng háishì gè háizi, bùyào duì tā yāoqiú tài gāo.
exampleEnglish: After all, he's just a child; don't expect too much from him.

exampleSimplified: 他们就这个问题进行了激烈的辩论。
exampleTraditional: 他們就這個問題進行了激烈的辯論。
examplePinyin: Tāmen jiù zhège wèntí jìnxíng le jīliè de biànlùn.
exampleEnglish: They had a heated debate over this issue.

exampleSimplified: 这个产品符合国际标准。
exampleTraditional: 這個產品符合國際標準。
examplePinyin: Zhège chǎnpǐn fúhé guójì biāozhǔn.
exampleEnglish: This product meets international standards.

exampleSimplified: 电视台正在播放世界杯比赛。
exampleTraditional: 電視台正在播放世界杯比賽。
examplePinyin: Diànshìtái zhèngzài bōfàng shìjiè bēi bǐsài.
exampleEnglish: The TV station is broadcasting the World Cup match.

english: to supplement; to add; to replenish
exampleSimplified: 请大家补充自己的意见。
exampleTraditional: 請大家補充自己的意見。
examplePinyin: Qǐng dàjiā bǔchōng zìjǐ de yìjiàn.
exampleEnglish: Please everyone add their own opinions.

exampleSimplified: 等了很久，他开始有些不耐烦了。
exampleTraditional: 等了很久，他開始有些不耐煩了。
examplePinyin: Děng le hěn jiǔ, tā kāishǐ yǒuxiē bù nàifán le.
exampleEnglish: Having waited a long time, he started to get a bit impatient.

exampleSimplified: 他对别人的看法完全不在乎。
exampleTraditional: 他對別人的看法完全不在乎。
examplePinyin: Tā duì biérén de kànfǎ wánquán bù zàihu.
exampleEnglish: He doesn't care at all about what others think.

english: unconsciously; without noticing; before one knows it
exampleSimplified: 不知不觉，天已经黑了。
exampleTraditional: 不知不覺，天已經黑了。
examplePinyin: Bù zhī bù jué, tiān yǐjīng hēi le.
exampleEnglish: Before we knew it, it had already gotten dark.

exampleSimplified: 她有很高的艺术才能。
exampleTraditional: 她有很高的藝術才能。
examplePinyin: Tā yǒu hěn gāo de yìshù cáinéng.
exampleEnglish: She has great artistic talent.

exampleSimplified: 这些财产是父母留下来的。
exampleTraditional: 這些財產是父母留下來的。
examplePinyin: Zhèxiē cáichǎn shì fùmǔ liú xiàlái de.
exampleEnglish: These assets were left by their parents.

exampleSimplified: 政府采取了一系列措施应对危机。
exampleTraditional: 政府採取了一系列措施應對危機。
examplePinyin: Zhèngfǔ cǎiqǔ le yī xìliè cuòshī yìngduì wēijī.
exampleEnglish: The government adopted a series of measures to respond to the crisis.

exampleSimplified: 公司需要调整市场策略。
exampleTraditional: 公司需要調整市場策略。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī xūyào tiáozhěng shìchǎng cèlüè.
exampleEnglish: The company needs to adjust its market strategy.

exampleSimplified: 他曾经在北京生活过三年。
exampleTraditional: 他曾經在北京生活過三年。
examplePinyin: Tā céngjīng zài Běijīng shēnghuó guò sān nián.
exampleEnglish: He once lived in Beijing for three years.

exampleSimplified: 他经常开车进行长途旅行。
exampleTraditional: 他經常開車進行長途旅行。
examplePinyin: Tā jīngcháng kāichē jìnxíng chángtú lǚxíng.
exampleEnglish: He often takes long-distance road trips.

exampleSimplified: 年轻人总是追赶时代的潮流。
exampleTraditional: 年輕人總是追趕時代的潮流。
examplePinyin: Niánqīngrén zǒngshì zhuīgǎn shídài de cháoliú.
exampleEnglish: Young people always chase the trends of the times.

exampleSimplified: 我们需要彻底解决这个问题。
exampleTraditional: 我們需要徹底解決這個問題。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen xūyào chèdǐ jiějué zhège wèntí.
exampleEnglish: We need to thoroughly resolve this problem.

exampleSimplified: 他在科学领域取得了重大成就。
exampleTraditional: 他在科學領域取得了重大成就。
examplePinyin: Tā zài kēxué lǐngyù qǔdé le zhòngdà chéngjiù.
exampleEnglish: He has achieved great accomplishments in the field of science.

exampleSimplified: 诚信是做人的基本准则。
exampleTraditional: 誠信是做人的基本準則。
examplePinyin: Chéngxìn shì zuòrén de jīběn zhǔnzé.
exampleEnglish: Integrity is the basic principle of being a person.

english: to bear; to undertake; to assume (responsibility)
exampleSimplified: 你必须承担自己的责任。
exampleTraditional: 你必須承擔自己的責任。
examplePinyin: Nǐ bìxū chéngdān zìjǐ de zérèn.
exampleEnglish: You must bear your own responsibilities.

exampleSimplified: 中国的出口商品种类繁多。
exampleTraditional: 中國的出口商品種類繁多。
examplePinyin: Zhōngguó de chūkǒu shāngpǐn zhǒnglèi fánduō.
exampleEnglish: China's exported goods are of many varieties.

exampleSimplified: 除非你努力学习，否则不会通过考试。
exampleTraditional: 除非你努力學習，否則不會通過考試。
examplePinyin: Chúfēi nǐ nǔlì xuéxí, fǒuzé bù huì tōngguò kǎoshì.
exampleEnglish: Unless you study hard, you won't pass the exam.

english: legend; tradition; to say; it is said
exampleSimplified: 传说这里曾经是一个美丽的湖泊。
exampleTraditional: 傳說這裡曾經是一個美麗的湖泊。
examplePinyin: Chuánshuō zhèlǐ céngjīng shì yī gè měilì de húpō.
exampleEnglish: Legend has it that this place was once a beautiful lake.

exampleSimplified: 学习一门语言需要掌握大量词汇。
exampleTraditional: 學習一門語言需要掌握大量詞彙。
examplePinyin: Xuéxí yī mén yǔyán xūyào zhǎngwò dàliàng cíhuì.
exampleEnglish: Learning a language requires mastering a large vocabulary.

english: to be engaged in; to go in for; to deal with
exampleSimplified: 她从事教育工作已经二十年了。
exampleTraditional: 她從事教育工作已經二十年了。
examplePinyin: Tā cóngshì jiàoyù gōngzuò yǐjīng èrshí nián le.
exampleEnglish: She has been engaged in education for twenty years.

exampleSimplified: 犯了错误就应该及时改正。
exampleTraditional: 犯了錯誤就應該及時改正。
examplePinyin: Fàn le cuòwù jiù yīnggāi jíshí gǎizhèng.
exampleEnglish: When you make a mistake, you should correct it promptly.

english: to reach; to achieve; to attain
exampleSimplified: 他的成绩达到了全班最高水平。
exampleTraditional: 他的成績達到了全班最高水平。
examplePinyin: Tā de chéngjī dádào le quán bān zuìgāo shuǐpíng.
exampleEnglish: His grades reached the highest level in the class.

english: generous; natural and graceful; not stingy
exampleSimplified: 他做人很大方，经常请朋友吃饭。
exampleTraditional: 他做人很大方，經常請朋友吃飯。
examplePinyin: Tā zuòrén hěn dàfang, jīngcháng qǐng péngyou chīfàn.
exampleEnglish: He is very generous and often treats his friends to meals.

english: large amount; great quantity; a lot of
exampleSimplified: 这个项目需要大量的资金支持。
exampleTraditional: 這個項目需要大量的資金支持。
examplePinyin: Zhège xiàngmù xūyào dàliàng de zījīn zhīchí.
exampleEnglish: This project requires a large amount of financial support.

exampleSimplified: 这座建筑设计得非常大气。
exampleTraditional: 這座建築設計得非常大氣。
examplePinyin: Zhè zuò jiànzhù shèjì de fēicháng dàqì.
exampleEnglish: This building is designed very impressively.

exampleSimplified: 从这里到车站大约需要二十分钟。
exampleTraditional: 從這裡到車站大約需要二十分鐘。
examplePinyin: Cóng zhèlǐ dào chēzhàn dàyuē xūyào èrshí fēnzhōng.
exampleEnglish: It takes approximately twenty minutes from here to the station.

english: representative; to represent; on behalf of
exampleSimplified: 他作为公司的代表出席了会议。
exampleTraditional: 他作為公司的代表出席了會議。
examplePinyin: Tā zuòwéi gōngsī de dàibiǎo chūxí le huìyì.
exampleEnglish: He attended the meeting as a representative of the company.

exampleSimplified: 他是当代最有影响力的作家之一。
exampleTraditional: 他是當代最有影響力的作家之一。
examplePinyin: Tā shì dāngdài zuì yǒu yǐngxiǎnglì de zuòjiā zhī yī.
exampleEnglish: He is one of the most influential writers of the contemporary era.

exampleSimplified: 厨师用刀把蔬菜切成小块。
exampleTraditional: 廚師用刀把蔬菜切成小塊。
examplePinyin: Chúshī yòng dāo bǎ shūcài qiē chéng xiǎo kuài.
exampleEnglish: The chef used a knife to cut the vegetables into small pieces.

exampleSimplified: 一个人要有道德底线。
exampleTraditional: 一個人要有道德底線。
examplePinyin: Yī gè rén yào yǒu dàodé dǐxiàn.
exampleEnglish: A person must have a moral baseline.

english: to register; to check in; registration
exampleSimplified: 入住酒店前需要先登记。
exampleTraditional: 入住酒店前需要先登記。
examplePinyin: Rùzhù jiǔdiàn qián xūyào xiān dēngjì.
exampleEnglish: You need to register before checking into the hotel.

exampleSimplified: 她去茶楼品尝了各种各样的点心。
exampleTraditional: 她去茶樓品嚐了各種各樣的點心。
examplePinyin: Tā qù chálóu pǐncháng le gè zhǒng gèyàng de diǎnxīn.
exampleEnglish: She went to the teahouse to taste various kinds of dim sum.

exampleSimplified: 公司决定调整工作时间。
exampleTraditional: 公司決定調整工作時間。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī juédìng tiáozhěng gōngzuò shíjiān.
exampleEnglish: The company decided to adjust working hours.

english: top; peak; to carry on one's head; (measure word for hats)
exampleSimplified: 他们终于爬到了山顶。
exampleTraditional: 他們終於爬到了山頂。
examplePinyin: Tāmen zhōngyú pá dào le shāndǐng.
exampleEnglish: They finally climbed to the top of the mountain.

exampleSimplified: 我们每季度定期举行会议。
exampleTraditional: 我們每季度定期舉行會議。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen měi jìdù dìngqī jǔxíng huìyì.
exampleEnglish: We hold meetings regularly every quarter.

exampleSimplified: 这位艺术家有着非常独特的风格。
exampleTraditional: 這位藝術家有著非常獨特的風格。
examplePinyin: Zhè wèi yìshùjiā yǒuzhe fēicháng dútè de fēnggé.
exampleEnglish: This artist has a very unique style.

english: to treat; to deal with; to handle
exampleSimplified: 我们应该平等对待每一个人。
exampleTraditional: 我們應該平等對待每一個人。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi píngděng duìdài měi yī gè rén.
exampleEnglish: We should treat every person equally.

exampleSimplified: 这些解释是多余的，大家都明白了。
exampleTraditional: 這些解釋是多餘的，大家都明白了。
examplePinyin: Zhèxiē jiěshì shì duōyú de, dàjiā dōu míngbái le.
exampleEnglish: These explanations are unnecessary; everyone already understands.

english: to give play to; to bring into play; to display
exampleSimplified: 他在比赛中充分发挥了自己的能力。
exampleTraditional: 他在比賽中充分發揮了自己的能力。
examplePinyin: Tā zài bǐsài zhōng chōngfèn fāhuī le zìjǐ de nénglì.
exampleEnglish: He fully displayed his abilities in the competition.

exampleSimplified: 这个地区的经济发展非常迅速。
exampleTraditional: 這個地區的經濟發展非常迅速。
examplePinyin: Zhège dìqū de jīngjì fāzhǎn fēicháng xùnsù.
exampleEnglish: The economic development in this region is very rapid.

exampleSimplified: 他对这个消息的反应出乎我的意料。
exampleTraditional: 他對這個消息的反應出乎我的意料。
examplePinyin: Tā duì zhège xiāoxi de fǎnyìng chūhū wǒ de yìliào.
exampleEnglish: His reaction to the news was beyond my expectations.

exampleSimplified: 团队提出了三个不同的解决方案。
exampleTraditional: 團隊提出了三個不同的解決方案。
examplePinyin: Tuánduì tíchū le sān gè bùtóng de jiějué fāng'àn.
exampleEnglish: The team proposed three different solutions.

english: to relax; to loosen; to ease up
exampleSimplified: 工作之余，要注意放松身心。
exampleTraditional: 工作之餘，要注意放鬆身心。
examplePinyin: Gōngzuò zhī yú, yào zhùyì fàngsōng shēnxīn.
exampleEnglish: Outside of work, you should pay attention to relaxing your body and mind.

exampleSimplified: 投资有风险，入市需谨慎。
exampleTraditional: 投資有風險，入市需謹慎。
examplePinyin: Tóuzī yǒu fēngxiǎn, rùshì xū jǐnshèn.
exampleEnglish: Investment has risks; one must be careful when entering the market.

exampleSimplified: 你必须按时完成，否则会影响整个计划。
exampleTraditional: 你必須按時完成，否則會影響整個計劃。
examplePinyin: Nǐ bìxū ànshí wánchéng, fǒuzé huì yǐngxiǎng zhěnggè jìhuà.
exampleEnglish: You must finish on time; otherwise it will affect the entire plan.

exampleSimplified: 这个问题非常复杂，需要时间研究。
exampleTraditional: 這個問題非常複雜，需要時間研究。
examplePinyin: Zhège wèntí fēicháng fùzá, xūyào shíjiān yánjiū.
exampleEnglish: This problem is very complex and requires time to study.

exampleSimplified: 高房价给年轻人带来了很大的负担。
exampleTraditional: 高房價給年輕人帶來了很大的負擔。
examplePinyin: Gāo fángjià gěi niánqīngrén dài lái le hěn dà de fùdān.
exampleEnglish: High housing prices have placed a heavy burden on young people.

exampleSimplified: 这次教育改革对学生影响很大。
exampleTraditional: 這次教育改革對學生影響很大。
examplePinyin: Zhè cì jiàoyù gǎigé duì xuésheng yǐngxiǎng hěn dà.
exampleEnglish: This education reform has had a big impact on students.

english: to feel; to experience; feeling; experience
exampleSimplified: 旅行让我感受到了不同的文化。
exampleTraditional: 旅行讓我感受到了不同的文化。
examplePinyin: Lǚxíng ràng wǒ gǎnshòu dào le bùtóng de wénhuà.
exampleEnglish: Travel allowed me to experience different cultures.

exampleSimplified: 这家餐厅是一家高档餐厅，价格不菲。
exampleTraditional: 這家餐廳是一家高檔餐廳，價格不菲。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng shì yī jiā gāodàng cāntīng, jiàgé bùfēi.
exampleEnglish: This restaurant is a high-end establishment with steep prices.

exampleSimplified: 这场比赛的结果是公平的。
exampleTraditional: 這場比賽的結果是公平的。
examplePinyin: Zhè chǎng bǐsài de jiéguǒ shì gōngpíng de.
exampleEnglish: The result of this competition was fair.

exampleSimplified: 他为社会的发展做出了重大贡献。
exampleTraditional: 他為社會的發展做出了重大貢獻。
examplePinyin: Tā wèi shèhuì de fāzhǎn zuòchū le zhòngdà gòngxiàn.
exampleEnglish: He made a significant contribution to the development of society.

exampleSimplified: 演出结束后，观众们热烈鼓掌。
exampleTraditional: 演出結束後，觀眾們熱烈鼓掌。
examplePinyin: Yǎnchū jiéshù hòu, guānzhòngmen rèliè gǔzhǎng.
exampleEnglish: After the performance ended, the audience applauded enthusiastically.

english: admittedly; of course; though it is true that
exampleSimplified: 金钱固然重要，但健康更重要。
exampleTraditional: 金錢固然重要，但健康更重要。
examplePinyin: Jīnqián gùrán zhòngyào, dàn jiànkāng gèng zhòngyào.
exampleEnglish: Money is admittedly important, but health is more important.

exampleSimplified: 他在社会上有着广泛的影响。
exampleTraditional: 他在社會上有著廣泛的影響。
examplePinyin: Tā zài shèhuì shàng yǒuzhe guǎngfàn de yǐngxiǎng.
exampleEnglish: He has widespread influence in society.

english: standard; norm; to standardize; to regulate
exampleSimplified: 每个行业都有自己的行为规范。
exampleTraditional: 每個行業都有自己的行為規範。
examplePinyin: Měi gè hángyè dōu yǒu zìjǐ de xíngwéi guīfàn.
exampleEnglish: Every industry has its own code of conduct.

english: excessive; over the top; too much
exampleSimplified: 他的要求有些过分，让人难以接受。
exampleTraditional: 他的要求有些過分，讓人難以接受。
examplePinyin: Tā de yāoqiú yǒuxiē guòfèn, ràng rén nányǐ jiēshòu.
exampleEnglish: His demands are somewhat excessive and hard to accept.

exampleSimplified: 这首诗的含义非常深刻。
exampleTraditional: 這首詩的含義非常深刻。
examplePinyin: Zhè shǒu shī de hányì fēicháng shēnkè.
exampleEnglish: The meaning of this poem is very profound.

exampleSimplified: 这个价格非常合理，我接受了。
exampleTraditional: 這個價格非常合理，我接受了。
examplePinyin: Zhège jiàgé fēicháng hélǐ, wǒ jiēshòu le.
exampleEnglish: The price is very reasonable; I accepted it.

exampleSimplified: 同学们互相帮助，共同进步。
exampleTraditional: 同學們互相幫助，共同進步。
examplePinyin: Tóngxuémen hùxiāng bāngzhù, gòngtóng jìnbù.
exampleEnglish: Classmates help each other and make progress together.

exampleSimplified: 化学实验需要注意安全。
exampleTraditional: 化學實驗需要注意安全。
examplePinyin: Huàxué shíyàn xūyào zhùyì ānquán.
exampleEnglish: Chemistry experiments require attention to safety.

english: to ease; to alleviate; to relieve (tension/pain)
exampleSimplified: 吃了药以后，疼痛得到了缓解。
exampleTraditional: 吃了藥以後，疼痛得到了緩解。
examplePinyin: Chī le yào yǐhòu, téngtòng dédào le huǎnjiě.
exampleEnglish: After taking the medicine, the pain was relieved.

english: to recall; to recollect; memory; recollection
exampleSimplified: 每当听到这首歌，就会回忆起童年时光。
exampleTraditional: 每當聽到這首歌，就會回憶起童年時光。
examplePinyin: Měi dāng tīng dào zhè shǒu gē, jiù huì huíyì qǐ tóngnián shíguāng.
exampleEnglish: Whenever I hear this song, I recall my childhood days.

exampleSimplified: 今天美元兑人民币的汇率是多少？
exampleTraditional: 今天美元兌人民幣的匯率是多少？
examplePinyin: Jīntiān měiyuán duì rénmínbì de huìlǜ shì duōshao?
exampleEnglish: What is today's exchange rate of the US dollar against the RMB?

english: to accumulate; to build up; accumulation
exampleSimplified: 学习需要长期积累，不能急于求成。
exampleTraditional: 學習需要長期積累，不能急於求成。
examplePinyin: Xuéxí xūyào chángqī jīlěi, bùnéng jíyú qiú chéng.
exampleEnglish: Learning requires long-term accumulation; one cannot be impatient for quick results.

exampleSimplified: 老师的话激励了学生们努力学习。
exampleTraditional: 老師的話激勵了學生們努力學習。
examplePinyin: Lǎoshī de huà jīlì le xuéshengmen nǔlì xuéxí.
exampleEnglish: The teacher's words motivated the students to study hard.

exampleSimplified: 打好语言基础是学好外语的关键。
exampleTraditional: 打好語言基礎是學好外語的關鍵。
examplePinyin: Dǎhǎo yǔyán jīchǔ shì xuéhǎo wàiyǔ de guānjiàn.
exampleEnglish: Building a solid language foundation is the key to learning a foreign language well.

exampleSimplified: 他很快就算出了这道数学题的结果。
exampleTraditional: 他很快就算出了這道數學題的結果。
examplePinyin: Tā hěn kuài jiù suàn chū le zhè dào shùxué tí de jiéguǒ.
exampleEnglish: He quickly calculated the answer to the math problem.

exampleSimplified: 他打破了世界纪录。
exampleTraditional: 他打破了世界紀錄。
examplePinyin: Tā dǎpò le shìjiè jìlù.
exampleEnglish: He broke the world record.

english: to persist; to insist; to persevere
exampleSimplified: 坚持锻炼有益于身体健康。
exampleTraditional: 堅持鍛鍊有益於身體健康。
examplePinyin: Jiānchí duànliàn yǒuyì yú shēntǐ jiànkāng.
exampleEnglish: Persisting in exercise is beneficial to physical health.

english: to establish; to set up; to found
exampleSimplified: 两国决定建立长期合作关系。
exampleTraditional: 兩國決定建立長期合作關係。
examplePinyin: Liǎng guó juédìng jiànlì chángqī hézuò guānxi.
exampleEnglish: The two countries decided to establish a long-term cooperative relationship.

exampleSimplified: 这个方案将理论与实践很好地结合了起来。
exampleTraditional: 這個方案將理論與實踐很好地結合了起來。
examplePinyin: Zhège fāng'àn jiāng lǐlùn yǔ shíjiàn hěn hǎo de jiéhé le qǐlái.
exampleEnglish: This plan successfully combines theory with practice.

english: to solve; to resolve; to settle
exampleSimplified: 我们需要尽快解决这个技术问题。
exampleTraditional: 我們需要盡快解決這個技術問題。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen xūyào jǐnkuài jiějué zhège jìshù wèntí.
exampleEnglish: We need to solve this technical problem as soon as possible.

exampleSimplified: 他做事充满了精神和热情。
exampleTraditional: 他做事充滿了精神和熱情。
examplePinyin: Tā zuòshì chōngmǎn le jīngshén hé rèqíng.
exampleEnglish: He approaches everything with spirit and enthusiasm.

exampleSimplified: 他有丰富的工作经验。
exampleTraditional: 他有豐富的工作經驗。
examplePinyin: Tā yǒu fēngfù de gōngzuò jīngyàn.
exampleEnglish: He has rich work experience.

english: unexpectedly; surprisingly; actually (used to express surprise)
exampleSimplified: 他居然在这么短的时间内完成了任务。
exampleTraditional: 他居然在這麼短的時間內完成了任務。
examplePinyin: Tā jūrán zài zhème duǎn de shíjiān nèi wánchéng le rènwù.
exampleEnglish: He surprisingly completed the task in such a short time.

english: to limit; to confine; limitation; restriction
exampleSimplified: 不要把自己局限在一个狭小的领域。
exampleTraditional: 不要把自己局限在一個狹小的領域。
examplePinyin: Bùyào bǎ zìjǐ júxiàn zài yī gè xiáxiǎo de lǐngyù.
exampleEnglish: Don't confine yourself to a narrow field.

exampleSimplified: 请给我一个具体的例子来说明。
exampleTraditional: 請給我一個具體的例子來說明。
examplePinyin: Qǐng gěi wǒ yī gè jùtǐ de lìzi lái shuōmíng.
exampleEnglish: Please give me a specific example to illustrate.

english: to refuse; to reject; to decline
exampleSimplified: 她拒绝了他的邀请，因为她那天有事。
exampleTraditional: 她拒絕了他的邀請，因為她那天有事。
examplePinyin: Tā jùjué le tā de yāoqǐng, yīnwèi tā nà tiān yǒu shì.
exampleEnglish: She declined his invitation because she had something on that day.

exampleSimplified: 把颜料均匀地涂在画布上。
exampleTraditional: 把顏料均勻地塗在畫布上。
examplePinyin: Bǎ yánliào jūnyún de tú zài huàbù shàng.
exampleEnglish: Spread the paint evenly on the canvas.

english: to expand; to enlarge; to extend
exampleSimplified: 公司计划扩大生产规模。
exampleTraditional: 公司計劃擴大生產規模。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī jìhuà kuòdà shēngchǎn guīmó.
exampleEnglish: The company plans to expand its production scale.

exampleSimplified: 这条新闻的来源不可靠，要核实一下。
exampleTraditional: 這條新聞的來源不可靠，要核實一下。
examplePinyin: Zhè tiáo xīnwén de láiyuán bù kěkào, yào héshí yīxià.
exampleEnglish: The source of this news is unreliable; it needs to be verified.

exampleSimplified: 我完全理解你的想法。
exampleTraditional: 我完全理解你的想法。
examplePinyin: Wǒ wánquán lǐjiě nǐ de xiǎngfǎ.
exampleEnglish: I completely understand your way of thinking.

english: to unite; to combine; joint; alliance
exampleSimplified: 两家公司决定联合开发新产品。
exampleTraditional: 兩家公司決定聯合開發新產品。
examplePinyin: Liǎng jiā gōngsī juédìng liánhé kāifā xīn chǎnpǐn.
exampleEnglish: The two companies decided to jointly develop new products.

exampleSimplified: 他的学习成绩非常良好。
exampleTraditional: 他的學習成績非常良好。
examplePinyin: Tā de xuéxí chéngjī fēicháng liánghǎo.
exampleEnglish: His academic performance is very good.

exampleSimplified: 我们的工作时间很灵活，可以自己安排。
exampleTraditional: 我們的工作時間很靈活，可以自己安排。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen de gōngzuò shíjiān hěn línghuó, kěyǐ zìjǐ ānpái.
exampleEnglish: Our working hours are very flexible; we can arrange them ourselves.

exampleSimplified: 人工智能在各个领域都有广泛应用。
exampleTraditional: 人工智能在各個領域都有廣泛應用。
examplePinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng zài gège lǐngyù dōu yǒu guǎngfàn yìngyòng.
exampleEnglish: Artificial intelligence is widely applied in various fields.

exampleSimplified: 他的推理非常有逻辑性。
exampleTraditional: 他的推理非常有邏輯性。
examplePinyin: Tā de tuīlǐ fēicháng yǒu luójí xìng.
exampleEnglish: His reasoning is very logical.

exampleSimplified: 这份工作让他感到满足。
exampleTraditional: 這份工作讓他感到滿足。
examplePinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò ràng tā gǎndào mǎnzú.
exampleEnglish: This job makes him feel satisfied.

exampleSimplified: 他每天都很忙碌，几乎没有休息时间。
exampleTraditional: 他每天都很忙碌，幾乎沒有休息時間。
examplePinyin: Tā měitiān dōu hěn mánglù, jīhū méiyǒu xiūxi shíjiān.
exampleEnglish: He is busy every day and has almost no time to rest.

exampleSimplified: 他的言行之间存在很大的矛盾。
exampleTraditional: 他的言行之間存在很大的矛盾。
examplePinyin: Tā de yán xíng zhījiān cúnzài hěn dà de máodùn.
exampleEnglish: There is a big contradiction between what he says and what he does.

exampleSimplified: 请明确说明你的要求。
exampleTraditional: 請明確說明你的要求。
examplePinyin: Qǐng míngquè shuōmíng nǐ de yāoqiú.
exampleEnglish: Please clearly state your requirements.

exampleSimplified: 目前，这个项目还在进行中。
exampleTraditional: 目前，這個項目還在進行中。
examplePinyin: Mùqián, zhège xiàngmù hái zài jìnxíng zhōng.
exampleEnglish: Currently, this project is still in progress.

exampleSimplified: 这本书的内容非常丰富。
exampleTraditional: 這本書的內容非常豐富。
examplePinyin: Zhè běn shū de nèiróng fēicháng fēngfù.
exampleEnglish: The content of this book is very rich.

exampleSimplified: 每个人都应该发挥自己的能力。
exampleTraditional: 每個人都應該發揮自己的能力。
examplePinyin: Měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi fāhuī zìjǐ de nénglì.
exampleEnglish: Everyone should give full play to their abilities.

exampleSimplified: 上个世纪八十年代，中国开始了改革开放。
exampleTraditional: 上個世紀八十年代，中國開始了改革開放。
examplePinyin: Shàng gè shìjì bāshí niándài, Zhōngguó kāishǐ le gǎigé kāifàng.
exampleEnglish: In the 1980s, China began its reform and opening up.

english: to cultivate; to foster; to train; to develop
exampleSimplified: 学校注重培养学生的创新能力。
exampleTraditional: 學校注重培養學生的創新能力。
examplePinyin: Xuéxiào zhùzhòng péiyǎng xuésheng de chuàngxīn nénglì.
exampleEnglish: The school emphasizes cultivating students' innovative abilities.

exampleSimplified: 工作和生活之间要保持平衡。
exampleTraditional: 工作和生活之間要保持平衡。
examplePinyin: Gōngzuò hé shēnghuó zhījiān yào bǎochí pínghéng.
exampleEnglish: It's important to maintain a balance between work and life.

english: to evaluate; to assess; evaluation; appraisal
exampleSimplified: 老师对他的表现给出了很高的评价。
exampleTraditional: 老師對他的表現給出了很高的評價。
examplePinyin: Lǎoshī duì tā de biǎoxiàn gěichū le hěn gāo de píngjià.
exampleEnglish: The teacher gave him a very high evaluation of his performance.

exampleSimplified: 她迫不及待地打开了生日礼物。
exampleTraditional: 她迫不及待地打開了生日禮物。
examplePinyin: Tā pò bù jí dài de dǎkāi le shēngrì lǐwù.
exampleEnglish: She eagerly opened her birthday present without being able to wait.

exampleSimplified: 使用智能手机已经成为一种普遍现象。
exampleTraditional: 使用智能手機已經成為一種普遍現象。
examplePinyin: Shǐyòng zhìnéng shǒujī yǐjīng chéngwéi yī zhǒng pǔbiàn xiànxiàng.
exampleEnglish: Using smartphones has become a widespread phenomenon.

exampleSimplified: 在假期期间，他去了欧洲旅行。
exampleTraditional: 在假期期間，他去了歐洲旅行。
examplePinyin: Zài jiàqī qījiān, tā qù le Ōuzhōu lǚxíng.
exampleEnglish: During the holiday, he traveled to Europe.

exampleSimplified: 这些任务由你负责，其余的由我来处理。
exampleTraditional: 這些任務由你負責，其餘的由我來處理。
examplePinyin: Zhèxiē rènwù yóu nǐ fùzé, qíyú de yóu wǒ lái chǔlǐ.
exampleEnglish: You are responsible for these tasks, and I'll handle the rest.

exampleSimplified: 这家企业在全国有五十多家分支机构。
exampleTraditional: 這家企業在全國有五十多家分支機構。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā qǐyè zài quánguó yǒu wǔshí duō jiā fēnzhī jīgòu.
exampleEnglish: This enterprise has more than fifty branch offices across the country.

exampleSimplified: 他的前途一片光明。
exampleTraditional: 他的前途一片光明。
examplePinyin: Tā de qiántú yī piàn guāngmíng.
exampleEnglish: His future prospects are very bright.

exampleSimplified: 老师强调了这道题的重要性。
exampleTraditional: 老師強調了這道題的重要性。
examplePinyin: Lǎoshī qiángdiào le zhè dào tí de zhòngyào xìng.
exampleEnglish: The teacher emphasized the importance of this problem.

exampleSimplified: 请向我说明一下目前的情况。
exampleTraditional: 請向我說明一下目前的情況。
examplePinyin: Qǐng xiàng wǒ shuōmíng yīxià mùqián de qíngkuàng.
exampleEnglish: Please explain the current situation to me.

exampleSimplified: 这件事确实很重要，不能忽视。
exampleTraditional: 這件事確實很重要，不能忽視。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiàn shì quèshí hěn zhòngyào, bùnéng hūshì.
exampleEnglish: This matter is indeed very important and cannot be ignored.

exampleSimplified: 这项政策主要针对老年群体。
exampleTraditional: 這項政策主要針對老年群體。
examplePinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèngcè zhǔyào zhēnduì lǎonián qúntǐ.
exampleEnglish: This policy is mainly targeted at the elderly group.

english: to love ardently; to be passionate about
exampleSimplified: 他热爱音乐，每天都坚持练习。
exampleTraditional: 他熱愛音樂，每天都堅持練習。
examplePinyin: Tā rè'ài yīnyuè, měitiān dōu jiānchí liànxí.
exampleEnglish: He is passionate about music and practices every day.

exampleSimplified: 现场观众对表演给予了热烈的欢迎。
exampleTraditional: 現場觀眾對表演給予了熱烈的歡迎。
examplePinyin: Xiànchǎng guānzhòng duì biǎoyǎn jǐyǔ le rèliè de huānyíng.
exampleEnglish: The audience at the scene gave the performance an enthusiastic welcome.

exampleSimplified: 这家公司非常重视吸引和留住人才。
exampleTraditional: 這家公司非常重視吸引和留住人才。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī fēicháng zhòngshì xīyǐn hé liúzhù réncái.
exampleEnglish: This company places great emphasis on attracting and retaining talent.

english: to know; to recognize; understanding; knowledge
exampleSimplified: 我们是在一次会议上认识的。
exampleTraditional: 我們是在一次會議上認識的。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen shì zài yī cì huìyì shàng rènshi de.
exampleEnglish: We met at a conference.

english: increasingly; day by day; more and more
exampleSimplified: 这项技术日益成熟，应用越来越广泛。
exampleTraditional: 這項技術日益成熟，應用越來越廣泛。
examplePinyin: Zhè xiàng jìshù rìyì chéngshú, yìngyòng yuèlái yuè guǎngfàn.
exampleEnglish: This technology is becoming increasingly mature and its application is growing wider.

exampleSimplified: 如果有任何问题，请随时联系我。
exampleTraditional: 如果有任何問題，請隨時聯繫我。
examplePinyin: Rúguǒ yǒu rènhé wèntí, qǐng suíshí liánxì wǒ.
exampleEnglish: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me.

english: to merge; to integrate; fusion; blend
exampleSimplified: 这道菜融合了中西方的烹饪技巧。
exampleTraditional: 這道菜融合了中西方的烹飪技巧。
examplePinyin: Zhè dào cài rónghé le zhōng xīfāng de pēngrèn jìqiǎo.
exampleEnglish: This dish blends Chinese and Western cooking techniques.

exampleSimplified: 理论要与实际相结合。
exampleTraditional: 理論要與實際相結合。
examplePinyin: Lǐlùn yào yǔ shíjì xiāng jiéhé.
exampleEnglish: Theory must be combined with practice.

english: to realize; to achieve; to fulfill
exampleSimplified: 通过努力，她终于实现了自己的梦想。
exampleTraditional: 通過努力，她終於實現了自己的夢想。
examplePinyin: Tōngguò nǔlì, tā zhōngyú shíxiàn le zìjǐ de mèngxiǎng.
exampleEnglish: Through hard work, she finally realized her dream.

english: to use; to employ; to apply
exampleSimplified: 请正确使用这台机器。
exampleTraditional: 請正確使用這台機器。
examplePinyin: Qǐng zhèngquè shǐyòng zhè tái jīqì.
exampleEnglish: Please use this machine correctly.

english: whether or not; is it or not
exampleSimplified: 我不确定他是否会来参加聚会。
exampleTraditional: 我不確定他是否會來參加聚會。
examplePinyin: Wǒ bù quèdìng tā shìfǒu huì lái cānjiā jùhuì.
exampleEnglish: I'm not sure whether he will come to the party.

exampleSimplified: 我们必须面对事实，接受现实。
exampleTraditional: 我們必須面對事實，接受現實。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen bìxū miànduì shìshí, jiēshòu xiànshí.
exampleEnglish: We must face the facts and accept reality.

exampleSimplified: 他的月收入大约是一万元。
exampleTraditional: 他的月收入大約是一萬元。
examplePinyin: Tā de yuè shōurù dàyuē shì yī wàn yuán.
exampleEnglish: His monthly income is approximately 10,000 yuan.

english: along with; as; following; in pace with
exampleSimplified: 随着科技的发展，人们的生活越来越便利。
exampleTraditional: 隨著科技的發展，人們的生活越來越便利。
examplePinyin: Suízhe kējì de fāzhǎn, rénmen de shēnghuó yuèlái yuè biànlì.
exampleEnglish: As technology develops, people's lives become increasingly convenient.

english: to explore; to investigate; to discuss
exampleSimplified: 学者们共同探讨了这个历史问题。
exampleTraditional: 學者們共同探討了這個歷史問題。
examplePinyin: Xuézhěmen gòngtóng tàntǎo le zhège lìshǐ wèntí.
exampleEnglish: Scholars jointly explored this historical issue.

exampleSimplified: 这种植物的主要特征是叶子很大。
exampleTraditional: 這種植物的主要特徵是葉子很大。
examplePinyin: Zhè zhǒng zhíwù de zhǔyào tèzhēng shì yèzi hěn dà.
exampleEnglish: The main characteristic of this plant is that its leaves are very large.

english: to reflect; to embody; to manifest
exampleSimplified: 这部小说体现了作者对人性的深刻思考。
exampleTraditional: 這部小說體現了作者對人性的深刻思考。
examplePinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō tǐxiàn le zuòzhě duì rénxìng de shēnkè sīkǎo.
exampleEnglish: This novel reflects the author's profound thinking about human nature.

exampleSimplified: 他是一个音乐天才，四岁就开始学习钢琴。
exampleTraditional: 他是一個音樂天才，四歲就開始學習鋼琴。
examplePinyin: Tā shì yī gè yīnyuè tiāncái, sì suì jiù kāishǐ xuéxí gāngqín.
exampleEnglish: He is a musical genius who started learning the piano at age four.

english: to agree; to consent; to approve
exampleSimplified: 他同意了我提出的建议。
exampleTraditional: 他同意了我提出的建議。
examplePinyin: Tā tóngyì le wǒ tíchū de jiànyì.
exampleEnglish: He agreed to the suggestion I put forward.

exampleSimplified: 民主是现代社会的重要价值观。
exampleTraditional: 民主是現代社會的重要價值觀。
examplePinyin: Mínzhǔ shì xiàndài shèhuì de zhòngyào jiàzhíguān.
exampleEnglish: Democracy is an important value in modern society.

exampleSimplified: 每个公民都有受教育的权利。
exampleTraditional: 每個公民都有受教育的權利。
examplePinyin: Měi gè gōngmín dōu yǒu shòu jiàoyù de quánlì.
exampleEnglish: Every citizen has the right to education.

exampleSimplified: 纳税是每个公民的义务。
exampleTraditional: 納稅是每個公民的義務。
examplePinyin: Nàshuì shì měi gè gōngmín de yìwù.
exampleEnglish: Paying taxes is the obligation of every citizen.

exampleSimplified: 公民参与选举是民主社会的体现。
exampleTraditional: 公民參與選舉是民主社會的體現。
examplePinyin: Gōngmín cānyù xuǎnjǔ shì mínzhǔ shèhuì de tǐxiàn.
exampleEnglish: Citizens' participation in elections reflects a democratic society.

exampleSimplified: 政府出台了新的就业政策。
exampleTraditional: 政府出台了新的就業政策。
examplePinyin: Zhèngfǔ chūtái le xīn de jiùyè zhèngcè.
exampleEnglish: The government introduced new employment policies.

exampleSimplified: 这位官员因腐败被调查。
exampleTraditional: 這位官員因腐敗被調查。
examplePinyin: Zhè wèi guānyuán yīn fǔbài bèi diàochá.
exampleEnglish: This official was investigated for corruption.

exampleSimplified: 两国通过外交手段解决了争端。
exampleTraditional: 兩國通過外交手段解決了爭端。
examplePinyin: Liǎng guó tōngguò wàijiāo shǒuduàn jiějué le zhēngduān.
exampleEnglish: The two countries resolved the dispute through diplomatic means.

exampleSimplified: 每个国家都有维护本国主权的权利。
exampleTraditional: 每個國家都有維護本國主權的權利。
examplePinyin: Měi gè guójiā dōu yǒu wéihù běn guó zhǔquán de quánlì.
exampleEnglish: Every country has the right to safeguard its own sovereignty.

exampleSimplified: 军事实力是维护国家安全的重要手段。
exampleTraditional: 軍事實力是維護國家安全的重要手段。
examplePinyin: Jūnshì shílì shì wéihù guójiā ānquán de zhòngyào shǒuduàn.
exampleEnglish: Military strength is an important means of safeguarding national security.

exampleSimplified: 双方在这个问题上产生了严重冲突。
exampleTraditional: 雙方在這個問題上產生了嚴重衝突。
examplePinyin: Shuāngfāng zài zhège wèntí shàng chǎnshēng le yánzhòng chōngtū.
exampleEnglish: The two sides had a serious conflict over this issue.

exampleSimplified: 社会稳定是经济发展的前提。
exampleTraditional: 社會穩定是經濟發展的前提。
examplePinyin: Shèhuì wěndìng shì jīngjì fāzhǎn de qiántí.
exampleEnglish: Social stability is a prerequisite for economic development.

exampleSimplified: 世界和平是全人类共同的愿望。
exampleTraditional: 世界和平是全人類共同的願望。
examplePinyin: Shìjiè hépíng shì quán rénlèi gòngtóng de yuànwàng.
exampleEnglish: World peace is the common aspiration of all humanity.

exampleSimplified: 两国在经济领域开展了广泛合作。
exampleTraditional: 兩國在經濟領域開展了廣泛合作。
examplePinyin: Liǎng guó zài jīngjì lǐngyù kāizhǎn le guǎngfàn hézuò.
exampleEnglish: The two countries have carried out extensive cooperation in the economic field.

exampleSimplified: 她负责组织这次国际会议。
exampleTraditional: 她負責組織這次國際會議。
examplePinyin: Tā fùzé zǔzhī zhè cì guójì huìyì.
exampleEnglish: She is responsible for organizing this international conference.

exampleSimplified: 这是一个非营利性机构，专门帮助弱势群体。
exampleTraditional: 這是一個非營利性機構，專門幫助弱勢群體。
examplePinyin: Zhè shì yī gè fēi yínglì xìng jīgòu, zhuānmén bāngzhù ruòshì qúntǐ.
exampleEnglish: This is a non-profit organization dedicated to helping vulnerable groups.

exampleSimplified: 这个问题将由专门委员会研究决定。
exampleTraditional: 這個問題將由專門委員會研究決定。
examplePinyin: Zhège wèntí jiāng yóu zhuānmén wěiyuánhuì yánjiū juédìng.
exampleEnglish: This issue will be studied and decided by a special committee.

english: to act as agent; to represent; proxy
exampleSimplified: 他在经理出差期间代理日常工作。
exampleTraditional: 他在經理出差期間代理日常工作。
examplePinyin: Tā zài jīnglǐ chūchāi qījiān dàilǐ rìcháng gōngzuò.
exampleEnglish: He handled the daily work as acting manager while the manager was on a business trip.

exampleSimplified: 政府需要加强对食品安全的监督。
exampleTraditional: 政府需要加強對食品安全的監督。
examplePinyin: Zhèngfǔ xūyào jiāqiáng duì shípǐn ānquán de jiāndū.
exampleEnglish: The government needs to strengthen supervision of food safety.

exampleSimplified: 他学习企业管理，希望将来经营自己的公司。
exampleTraditional: 他學習企業管理，希望將來經營自己的公司。
examplePinyin: Tā xuéxí qǐyè guǎnlǐ, xīwàng jiānglái jīngyíng zìjǐ de gōngsī.
exampleEnglish: He studies business management, hoping to run his own company in the future.

exampleSimplified: 一个好的领导能激励团队取得成功。
exampleTraditional: 一個好的領導能激勵團隊取得成功。
examplePinyin: Yī gè hǎo de lǐngdǎo néng jīlì tuánduì qǔdé chénggōng.
exampleEnglish: A good leader can inspire the team to succeed.

exampleSimplified: 每个员工都要明确自己的职责。
exampleTraditional: 每個員工都要明確自己的職責。
examplePinyin: Měi gè yuángōng dōu yào míngquè zìjǐ de zhízé.
exampleEnglish: Every employee must be clear about their own duties.

exampleSimplified: 他在规定时间内完成了所有任务。
exampleTraditional: 他在規定時間內完成了所有任務。
examplePinyin: Tā zài guīdìng shíjiān nèi wánchéng le suǒyǒu rènwù.
exampleEnglish: He completed all tasks within the specified time.

exampleSimplified: 这位教授是该领域的权威专家。
exampleTraditional: 這位教授是該領域的權威專家。
examplePinyin: Zhè wèi jiàoshòu shì gāi lǐngyù de quánwēi zhuānjiā.
exampleEnglish: This professor is an authoritative expert in the field.

exampleSimplified: 春节是中国最重要的传统节日。
exampleTraditional: 春節是中國最重要的傳統節日。
examplePinyin: Chūnjié shì Zhōngguó zuì zhòngyào de chuántǒng jiérì.
exampleEnglish: Spring Festival is the most important traditional holiday in China.

exampleSimplified: 了解历史有助于我们理解现在。
exampleTraditional: 了解歷史有助於我們理解現在。
examplePinyin: Liǎojiě lìshǐ yǒuzhù yú wǒmen lǐjiě xiànzài.
exampleEnglish: Understanding history helps us understand the present.

exampleSimplified: 不同国家有着不同的文化背景。
exampleTraditional: 不同國家有著不同的文化背景。
examplePinyin: Bùtóng guójiā yǒuzhe bùtóng de wénhuà bèijǐng.
exampleEnglish: Different countries have different cultural backgrounds.

exampleSimplified: 长城是中国著名的文化遗产。
exampleTraditional: 長城是中國著名的文化遺產。
examplePinyin: Chángchéng shì Zhōngguó zhùmíng de wénhuà yíchǎn.
exampleEnglish: The Great Wall is a famous cultural heritage of China.

exampleSimplified: 中国是一个多民族的国家。
exampleTraditional: 中國是一個多民族的國家。
examplePinyin: Zhōngguó shì yī gè duō mínzú de guójiā.
exampleEnglish: China is a multi-ethnic country.

exampleSimplified: 每个人都有信仰宗教的自由。
exampleTraditional: 每個人都有信仰宗教的自由。
examplePinyin: Měi gè rén dōu yǒu xìnyǎng zōngjiào de zìyóu.
exampleEnglish: Everyone has the freedom to follow a religion.

exampleSimplified: 她从小就对艺术充满了热情。
exampleTraditional: 她從小就對藝術充滿了熱情。
examplePinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù duì yìshù chōngmǎn le rèqíng.
exampleEnglish: She has been passionate about art since childhood.

exampleSimplified: 哲学研究的是人生的根本问题。
exampleTraditional: 哲學研究的是人生的根本問題。
examplePinyin: Zhéxué yánjiū de shì rénshēng de gēnběn wèntí.
exampleEnglish: Philosophy studies the fundamental questions of life.

exampleSimplified: 她对古典文学有着浓厚的兴趣。
exampleTraditional: 她對古典文學有著濃厚的興趣。
examplePinyin: Tā duì gǔdiǎn wénxué yǒuzhe nónghòu de xìngqù.
exampleEnglish: She has a strong interest in classical literature.

exampleSimplified: 音乐能够抚慰人的心灵。
exampleTraditional: 音樂能夠撫慰人的心靈。
examplePinyin: Yīnyuè nénggòu fǔwèi rén de xīnlíng.
exampleEnglish: Music can soothe people's hearts.

exampleSimplified: 他在业余时间喜欢绘画。
exampleTraditional: 他在業餘時間喜歡繪畫。
examplePinyin: Tā zài yèyú shíjiān xǐhuān huìhuà.
exampleEnglish: He enjoys painting in his spare time.

exampleSimplified: 博物馆里展出了许多珍贵的古代雕塑。
exampleTraditional: 博物館裡展出了許多珍貴的古代雕塑。
examplePinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le xǔduō zhēnguì de gǔdài diāosù.
exampleEnglish: The museum displays many precious ancient sculptures.

exampleSimplified: 他很喜欢看戏剧表演。
exampleTraditional: 他很喜歡看戲劇表演。
examplePinyin: Tā hěn xǐhuān kàn xìjù biǎoyǎn.
exampleEnglish: He enjoys watching theatrical performances.

exampleSimplified: 这座城市有很多古老的建筑。
exampleTraditional: 這座城市有很多古老的建築。
examplePinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì yǒu hěn duō gǔlǎo de jiànzhù.
exampleEnglish: This city has many ancient buildings.

exampleSimplified: 科技的进步改变了人类的生活方式。
exampleTraditional: 科技的進步改變了人類的生活方式。
examplePinyin: Kējì de jìnbù gǎibiàn le rénlèi de shēnghuó fāngshì.
exampleEnglish: The advancement of science and technology has changed humanity's way of life.

exampleSimplified: 掌握先进技术是企业发展的关键。
exampleTraditional: 掌握先進技術是企業發展的關鍵。
examplePinyin: Zhǎngwò xiānjìn jìshù shì qǐyè fāzhǎn de guānjiàn.
exampleEnglish: Mastering advanced technology is key to the development of enterprises.

exampleSimplified: 创新是企业保持竞争力的根本。
exampleTraditional: 創新是企業保持競爭力的根本。
examplePinyin: Chuàngxīn shì qǐyè bǎochí jìngzhēnglì de gēnběn.
exampleEnglish: Innovation is the foundation for enterprises to maintain competitiveness.

exampleSimplified: 网络已经成为现代生活不可缺少的一部分。
exampleTraditional: 網絡已經成為現代生活不可缺少的一部分。
examplePinyin: Wǎngluò yǐjīng chéngwéi xiàndài shēnghuó bùkě quēshǎo de yī bùfen.
exampleEnglish: The internet has become an indispensable part of modern life.

exampleSimplified: 这项研究收集了大量数据。
exampleTraditional: 這項研究收集了大量數據。
examplePinyin: Zhè xiàng yánjiū shōují le dàliàng shùjù.
exampleEnglish: This research collected a large amount of data.

exampleSimplified: 在信息时代，知识更新很快。
exampleTraditional: 在信息時代，知識更新很快。
examplePinyin: Zài xìnxī shídài, zhīshi gēngxīn hěn kuài.
exampleEnglish: In the information age, knowledge is updated very quickly.

exampleSimplified: 这款软件使用简单，功能强大。
exampleTraditional: 這款軟件使用簡單，功能強大。
examplePinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎnjiàn shǐyòng jiǎndān, gōngnéng qiángdà.
exampleEnglish: This software is easy to use and has powerful functions.

exampleSimplified: 升级电脑硬件可以提高运行速度。
exampleTraditional: 升級電腦硬件可以提高運行速度。
examplePinyin: Shēngjí diànnǎo yìngjiàn kěyǐ tígāo yùnxíng sùdù.
exampleEnglish: Upgrading computer hardware can improve running speed.

exampleSimplified: 人工智能正在改变各行各业。
exampleTraditional: 人工智能正在改變各行各業。
examplePinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng zhèngzài gǎibiàn gè háng gè yè.
exampleEnglish: Artificial intelligence is transforming every industry.

exampleSimplified: 保护环境是全人类的共同责任。
exampleTraditional: 保護環境是全人類的共同責任。
examplePinyin: Bǎohù huánjìng shì quán rénlèi de gòngtóng zérèn.
exampleEnglish: Protecting the environment is the common responsibility of all humanity.

exampleSimplified: 工厂排放的废气造成了严重的空气污染。
exampleTraditional: 工廠排放的廢氣造成了嚴重的空氣污染。
examplePinyin: Gōngchǎng páifàng de fèiqì zàochéng le yánzhòng de kōngqì wūrǎn.
exampleEnglish: Exhaust gases from factories have caused serious air pollution.

exampleSimplified: 开发新能源是解决能源危机的关键。
exampleTraditional: 開發新能源是解決能源危機的關鍵。
examplePinyin: Kāifā xīn néngyuán shì jiějué néngyuán wēijī de guānjiàn.
exampleEnglish: Developing new energy sources is key to solving the energy crisis.

exampleSimplified: 全球气候变暖是当前面临的重大挑战。
exampleTraditional: 全球氣候變暖是當前面臨的重大挑戰。
examplePinyin: Quánqiú qìhòu biàn nuǎn shì dāngqián miànlín de zhòngdà tiǎozhàn.
exampleEnglish: Global climate warming is a major challenge we currently face.

exampleSimplified: 合理利用自然资源是可持续发展的关键。
exampleTraditional: 合理利用自然資源是可持續發展的關鍵。
examplePinyin: Hélǐ lìyòng zìrán zīyuán shì kě chíxù fāzhǎn de guānjiàn.

exampleSimplified: 保护生态平衡是我们的责任。
exampleTraditional: 保護生態平衡是我們的責任。
examplePinyin: Bǎohù shēngtài pínghéng shì wǒmen de zérèn.
exampleEnglish: Protecting ecological balance is our responsibility.

exampleSimplified: 自然灾害给当地居民带来了巨大损失。
exampleTraditional: 自然災害給當地居民帶來了巨大損失。
examplePinyin: Zìrán zāihài gěi dāngdì jūmín dài lái le jùdà sǔnshī.
exampleEnglish: Natural disasters brought huge losses to local residents.

exampleSimplified: 医学的进步使人类的寿命大大延长。
exampleTraditional: 醫學的進步使人類的壽命大大延長。
examplePinyin: Yīxué de jìnbù shǐ rénlèi de shòumìng dàdà yáncháng.
exampleEnglish: Medical advances have greatly extended human life expectancy.

exampleSimplified: 预防疾病比治疗疾病更重要。
exampleTraditional: 預防疾病比治療疾病更重要。
examplePinyin: Yùfáng jíbìng bǐ zhìliáo jíbìng gèng zhòngyào.
exampleEnglish: Preventing disease is more important than treating disease.

exampleSimplified: 这种疾病目前还没有有效的治疗方法。
exampleTraditional: 這種疾病目前還沒有有效的治療方法。
examplePinyin: Zhè zhǒng jíbìng mùqián hái méiyǒu yǒuxiào de zhìliáo fāngfǎ.
exampleEnglish: There is currently no effective treatment for this disease.

exampleSimplified: 这种药物需要在医生指导下使用。
exampleTraditional: 這種藥物需要在醫生指導下使用。
examplePinyin: Zhè zhǒng yàowù xūyào zài yīshēng zhǐdǎo xià shǐyòng.
exampleEnglish: This medicine should be used under the guidance of a doctor.

exampleSimplified: 医生建议他接受手术治疗。
exampleTraditional: 醫生建議他接受手術治療。
examplePinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì tā jiēshòu shǒushù zhìliáo.
exampleEnglish: The doctor recommended that he undergo surgical treatment.

exampleSimplified: 合理饮食是保证营养均衡的关键。
exampleTraditional: 合理飲食是保證營養均衡的關鍵。
examplePinyin: Hélǐ yǐnshí shì bǎozhèng yíngyǎng jūnhéng de guānjiàn.
exampleEnglish: A balanced diet is the key to ensuring nutritional balance.

english: to work out; fitness; to keep fit
exampleSimplified: 他每周去健身房健身三次。
exampleTraditional: 他每週去健身房健身三次。
examplePinyin: Tā měi zhōu qù jiànshēnfáng jiànshēn sān cì.
exampleEnglish: He goes to the gym to work out three times a week.

exampleSimplified: 心理健康和身体健康同样重要。
exampleTraditional: 心理健康和身體健康同樣重要。
examplePinyin: Xīnlǐ jiànkāng hé shēntǐ jiànkāng tóngyàng zhòngyào.
exampleEnglish: Mental health is just as important as physical health.

exampleSimplified: 他学会了控制自己的情绪。
exampleTraditional: 他學會了控制自己的情緒。
examplePinyin: Tā xuéhuì le kòngzhì zìjǐ de qíngxù.
exampleEnglish: He has learned to control his emotions.

exampleSimplified: 她的性格开朗，很容易和别人相处。
exampleTraditional: 她的性格開朗，很容易和別人相處。
examplePinyin: Tā de xìnggé kāilǎng, hěn róngyì hé biérén xiāngchǔ.
exampleEnglish: She has an outgoing personality and gets along with others easily.

exampleSimplified: 工作态度决定了你能走多远。
exampleTraditional: 工作態度決定了你能走多遠。
examplePinyin: Gōngzuò tàidu juédìng le nǐ néng zǒu duō yuǎn.
exampleEnglish: Your work attitude determines how far you can go.

exampleSimplified: 我们要对自己的行为负责。
exampleTraditional: 我們要對自己的行為負責。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào duì zìjǐ de xíngwéi fùzé.
exampleEnglish: We must take responsibility for our own behavior.

english: habit; custom; to be used to
exampleSimplified: 养成良好的学习习惯很重要。
exampleTraditional: 養成良好的學習習慣很重要。
examplePinyin: Yǎngchéng liánghǎo de xuéxí xíguàn hěn zhòngyào.
exampleEnglish: Developing good study habits is very important.

exampleSimplified: 每个人都有自己的价值观。
exampleTraditional: 每個人都有自己的價值觀。
examplePinyin: Měi gè rén dōu yǒu zìjǐ de jiàzhíguān.
exampleEnglish: Everyone has their own values.

exampleSimplified: 他有着坚定的宗教信仰。
exampleTraditional: 他有著堅定的宗教信仰。
examplePinyin: Tā yǒuzhe jiāndìng de zōngjiào xìnyǎng.
exampleEnglish: He has a firm religious faith.

exampleSimplified: 通往成功的道路从来都不是一帆风顺的。
exampleTraditional: 通往成功的道路從來都不是一帆風順的。
examplePinyin: Tōng wǎng chénggōng de dàolù cónglái dōu bù shì yīfān fēngshùn de.
exampleEnglish: The road to success has never been smooth sailing.

exampleSimplified: 教育是实现阶层流动的重要途径。
exampleTraditional: 教育是實現階層流動的重要途徑。
examplePinyin: Jiàoyù shì shíxiàn jiēcéng liúdòng de zhòngyào tújìng.
exampleEnglish: Education is an important channel for achieving social mobility.

exampleSimplified: 他申请移民到加拿大。
exampleTraditional: 他申請移民到加拿大。
examplePinyin: Tā shēnqǐng yímín dào Jiānádà.
exampleEnglish: He applied to immigrate to Canada.

exampleSimplified: 消除贫困是全球面临的重大挑战。
exampleTraditional: 消除貧困是全球面臨的重大挑戰。
examplePinyin: Xiāochú pínkùn shì quánqiú miànlín de zhòngdà tiǎozhàn.
exampleEnglish: Eliminating poverty is a major challenge facing the world.

exampleSimplified: 这家公司的员工福利非常完善。
exampleTraditional: 這家公司的員工福利非常完善。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī de yuángōng fúlì fēicháng wánshàn.
exampleEnglish: This company's employee benefits are very comprehensive.

english: to guarantee; to safeguard; guarantee; protection
exampleSimplified: 法律是公民权利的保障。
exampleTraditional: 法律是公民權利的保障。
examplePinyin: Fǎlǜ shì gōngmín quánlì de bǎozhàng.
exampleEnglish: Law is the guarantee of citizens' rights.

exampleSimplified: 教育是国家发展的基础。
exampleTraditional: 教育是國家發展的基礎。
examplePinyin: Jiàoyù shì guójiā fāzhǎn de jīchǔ.
exampleEnglish: Education is the foundation of national development.

exampleSimplified: 她在学术界享有很高的声誉。
exampleTraditional: 她在學術界享有很高的聲譽。
examplePinyin: Tā zài xuéshùjiè xiǎngyǒu hěn gāo de shēngyù.
exampleEnglish: She enjoys a high reputation in academia.

exampleSimplified: 这门课程内容丰富，深受学生欢迎。
exampleTraditional: 這門課程內容豐富，深受學生歡迎。
examplePinyin: Zhè mén kèchéng nèiróng fēngfù, shēn shòu xuésheng huānyíng.
exampleEnglish: This course is rich in content and very popular with students.

exampleSimplified: 他花了三年时间完成了博士论文。
exampleTraditional: 他花了三年時間完成了博士論文。
examplePinyin: Tā huā le sān nián shíjiān wánchéng le bóshì lùnwén.
exampleEnglish: He spent three years completing his doctoral dissertation.

exampleSimplified: 科学家进行了大量实验来验证这个理论。
exampleTraditional: 科學家進行了大量實驗來驗證這個理論。
examplePinyin: Kēxuéjiā jìnxíng le dàliàng shíyàn lái yànzhèng zhège lǐlùn.
exampleEnglish: Scientists conducted numerous experiments to verify this theory.

exampleSimplified: 这个理论在实践中得到了验证。
exampleTraditional: 這個理論在實踐中得到了驗證。
examplePinyin: Zhège lǐlùn zài shíjiàn zhōng dédào le yànzhèng.
exampleEnglish: This theory has been verified in practice.

exampleSimplified: 科学研究往往从一个假设开始。
exampleTraditional: 科學研究往往從一個假設開始。
examplePinyin: Kēxué yánjiū wǎngwǎng cóng yī gè jiǎshè kāishǐ.
exampleEnglish: Scientific research often starts with a hypothesis.

exampleSimplified: 研究结果得出的结论与预期一致。
exampleTraditional: 研究結果得出的結論與預期一致。
examplePinyin: Yánjiū jiéguǒ dé chū de jiélùn yǔ yùqī yīzhì.
exampleEnglish: The conclusion drawn from the research results is consistent with expectations.

english: to prove; to demonstrate; proof; certificate
exampleSimplified: 实验结果证明了这个假设是正确的。
exampleTraditional: 實驗結果證明了這個假設是正確的。
examplePinyin: Shíyàn jiéguǒ zhèngmíng le zhège jiǎshè shì zhèngquè de.
exampleEnglish: The experimental results proved that this hypothesis is correct.

exampleSimplified: 我们需要仔细分析问题的原因。
exampleTraditional: 我們需要仔細分析問題的原因。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen xūyào zǐxì fēnxī wèntí de yuányīn.
exampleEnglish: We need to carefully analyze the cause of the problem.

exampleSimplified: 期末考试后，老师对本学期的内容进行了总结。
exampleTraditional: 期末考試後，老師對本學期的內容進行了總結。
examplePinyin: Qīmò kǎoshì hòu, lǎoshī duì běn xuéqī de nèiróng jìnxíng le zǒngjié.
exampleEnglish: After the final exam, the teacher summarized the semester's content.

exampleSimplified: 通过长期观察，科学家发现了这种动物的规律。
exampleTraditional: 通過長期觀察，科學家發現了這種動物的規律。
examplePinyin: Tōngguò chángqī guānchá, kēxuéjiā fāxiàn le zhè zhǒng dòngwù de guīlǜ.
exampleEnglish: Through long-term observation, scientists discovered the patterns of this animal.

exampleSimplified: 比较这两种方法，你更喜欢哪一种？
exampleTraditional: 比較這兩種方法，你更喜歡哪一種？
examplePinyin: Bǐjiào zhè liǎng zhǒng fāngfǎ, nǐ gèng xǐhuān nǎ yī zhǒng?
exampleEnglish: Comparing these two methods, which do you prefer?

exampleSimplified: 在做决定之前，要做出正确的判断。
exampleTraditional: 在做決定之前，要做出正確的判斷。
examplePinyin: Zài zuò juédìng zhīqián, yào zuòchū zhèngquè de pànduàn.
exampleEnglish: Before making a decision, you must make a correct judgment.

exampleSimplified: 根据现有证据，我们可以推断出结论。
exampleTraditional: 根據現有證據，我們可以推斷出結論。
examplePinyin: Gēnjù xiànyǒu zhèngjù, wǒmen kěyǐ tuīduàn chū jiélùn.
exampleEnglish: Based on available evidence, we can deduce a conclusion.

exampleSimplified: 请你解释一下这个词的意思。
exampleTraditional: 請你解釋一下這個詞的意思。
examplePinyin: Qǐng nǐ jiěshì yīxià zhège cí de yìsi.
exampleEnglish: Please explain the meaning of this word.

exampleSimplified: 他用生动的语言描述了那次旅行的经历。
exampleTraditional: 他用生動的語言描述了那次旅行的經歷。
examplePinyin: Tā yòng shēngdòng de yǔyán miáoshù le nà cì lǚxíng de jīnglì.
exampleEnglish: He described that travel experience with vivid language.

exampleSimplified: 他善于用文字表达自己的感情。
exampleTraditional: 他善於用文字表達自己的感情。
examplePinyin: Tā shànyú yòng wénzì biǎodá zìjǐ de gǎnqíng.
exampleEnglish: He is good at expressing his feelings through writing.

exampleSimplified: 有效的沟通是团队合作的基础。
exampleTraditional: 有效的溝通是團隊合作的基礎。
examplePinyin: Yǒuxiào de gōutōng shì tuánduì hézuò de jīchǔ.
exampleEnglish: Effective communication is the foundation of teamwork.

exampleSimplified: 中外文化交流促进了相互理解。
exampleTraditional: 中外文化交流促進了相互理解。
examplePinyin: Zhōng wài wénhuà jiāoliú cùjìn le xiānghù lǐjiě.
exampleEnglish: Cultural exchange between China and foreign countries promotes mutual understanding.

exampleSimplified: 大家就这个问题展开了热烈的讨论。
exampleTraditional: 大家就這個問題展開了熱烈的討論。
examplePinyin: Dàjiā jiù zhège wèntí zhǎnkāi le rèliè de tǎolùn.
exampleEnglish: Everyone had a heated discussion about this issue.

english: to reflect; to report; to mirror
exampleSimplified: 这部电影反映了社会的现实问题。
exampleTraditional: 這部電影反映了社會的現實問題。
examplePinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng fǎnyìng le shèhuì de xiànshí wèntí.
exampleEnglish: This film reflects real social problems.

exampleSimplified: 我们要虚心接受批评，不断改进。
exampleTraditional: 我們要虛心接受批評，不斷改進。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào xūxīn jiēshòu pīpíng, bùduàn gǎijìn.
exampleEnglish: We should humbly accept criticism and continuously improve.

exampleSimplified: 我建议你多休息，注意身体。
exampleTraditional: 我建議你多休息，注意身體。
examplePinyin: Wǒ jiànyì nǐ duō xiūxi, zhùyì shēntǐ.
exampleEnglish: I suggest you rest more and take care of your health.

english: to oppose; to be against; opposition
exampleSimplified: 他反对这个计划，认为风险太大。
exampleTraditional: 他反對這個計劃，認為風險太大。
examplePinyin: Tā fǎnduì zhège jìhuà, rènwéi fēngxiǎn tài dà.
exampleEnglish: He opposes this plan, thinking the risk is too great.

exampleSimplified: 感谢大家对这次活动的支持。
exampleTraditional: 感謝大家對這次活動的支持。
examplePinyin: Gǎnxiè dàjiā duì zhè cì huódòng de zhīchí.
exampleEnglish: Thank you all for your support of this event.

english: to accept; to receive; to take on
exampleSimplified: 他接受了这份工作的邀请。
exampleTraditional: 他接受了這份工作的邀請。
examplePinyin: Tā jiēshòu le zhè fèn gōngzuò de yāoqǐng.
exampleEnglish: He accepted the job offer.

english: to give up; to abandon; to quit
exampleSimplified: 无论多难，都不要轻易放弃。
exampleTraditional: 無論多難，都不要輕易放棄。
examplePinyin: Wúlùn duō nán, dōu bùyào qīngyì fàngqì.
exampleEnglish: No matter how difficult, never give up easily.

english: to overcome; to conquer; to surmount
exampleSimplified: 她克服了重重困难，终于成功了。
exampleTraditional: 她克服了重重困難，終於成功了。
examplePinyin: Tā kèfú le chóngchóng kùnnán, zhōngyú chénggōng le.
exampleEnglish: She overcame many difficulties and finally succeeded.

english: to adapt; to adjust to; adaptation
exampleSimplified: 他很快就适应了新的工作环境。
exampleTraditional: 他很快就適應了新的工作環境。
examplePinyin: Tā hěn kuài jiù shìyìng le xīn de gōngzuò huánjìng.
exampleEnglish: He quickly adapted to the new work environment.

english: to raise; to improve; to enhance
exampleSimplified: 他一直努力提高自己的专业技能。
exampleTraditional: 他一直努力提高自己的專業技能。
examplePinyin: Tā yīzhí nǔlì tígāo zìjǐ de zhuānyè jìnéng.
exampleEnglish: He has been working hard to improve his professional skills.

english: to promote; to advance; to facilitate
exampleSimplified: 文化交流有助于促进各国人民之间的友谊。
exampleTraditional: 文化交流有助於促進各國人民之間的友誼。
examplePinyin: Wénhuà jiāoliú yǒuzhù yú cùjìn gèguó rénmín zhījiān de yǒuyì.
exampleEnglish: Cultural exchange helps promote friendship among peoples of all countries.

english: to maintain; to safeguard; to uphold
exampleSimplified: 我们要维护社会的公平与正义。
exampleTraditional: 我們要維護社會的公平與正義。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào wéihù shèhuì de gōngpíng yǔ zhèngyì.
exampleEnglish: We must uphold social fairness and justice.

english: to promote; to spread; to popularize
exampleSimplified: 政府积极推广普通话教育。
exampleTraditional: 政府積極推廣普通話教育。
examplePinyin: Zhèngfǔ jījí tuīguǎng pǔtōnghuà jiàoyù.
exampleEnglish: The government actively promotes Mandarin education.

english: to develop; to exploit; to open up
exampleSimplified: 公司正在开发新的软件产品。
exampleTraditional: 公司正在開發新的軟件產品。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài kāifā xīn de ruǎnjiàn chǎnpǐn.
exampleEnglish: The company is developing new software products.

english: to use; to utilize; to take advantage of
exampleSimplified: 我们要充分利用现有资源。
exampleTraditional: 我們要充分利用現有資源。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào chōngfèn lìyòng xiànyǒu zīyuán.
exampleEnglish: We should make full use of available resources.

english: to implement; to carry out; to put into effect
exampleSimplified: 新的政策将于下个月开始实施。
exampleTraditional: 新的政策將於下個月開始實施。
examplePinyin: Xīn de zhèngcè jiāng yú xià gè yuè kāishǐ shíshī.
exampleEnglish: The new policy will be implemented next month.

exampleSimplified: 公司引进了国外先进的生产技术。
exampleTraditional: 公司引進了國外先進的生產技術。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī yǐnjìn le guówài xiānjìn de shēngchǎn jìshù.
exampleEnglish: The company introduced advanced production technology from abroad.

english: to appear; to emerge; to occur
exampleSimplified: 问题一旦出现，要及时解决。
exampleTraditional: 問題一旦出現，要及時解決。
examplePinyin: Wèntí yīdàn chūxiàn, yào jíshí jiějué.
exampleEnglish: Once a problem appears, it must be resolved promptly.

exampleSimplified: 随着时代的变化，一些传统习俗正在消失。
exampleTraditional: 隨著時代的變化，一些傳統習俗正在消失。
examplePinyin: Suízhe shídài de biànhuà, yīxiē chuántǒng xísú zhèngzài xiāoshī.
exampleEnglish: As times change, some traditional customs are disappearing.

exampleSimplified: 这几年城市的变化真的很大。
exampleTraditional: 這幾年城市的變化真的很大。
examplePinyin: Zhè jǐ nián chéngshì de biànhuà zhēn de hěn dà.
exampleEnglish: The changes in the city over the past few years have been really significant.

exampleSimplified: 网购已经成为消费的主要趋势。
exampleTraditional: 網購已經成為消費的主要趨勢。
examplePinyin: Wǎng gòu yǐjīng chéngwéi xiāofèi de zhǔyào qūshì.
exampleEnglish: Online shopping has become the main trend in consumption.

exampleSimplified: 做事要按照规律，不能凭感觉。
exampleTraditional: 做事要按照規律，不能憑感覺。
examplePinyin: Zuòshì yào ànzhào guīlǜ, bùnéng píng gǎnjué.
exampleEnglish: You should do things according to the rules, not just by feeling.

exampleSimplified: 失败的原因是多方面的，需要认真分析。
exampleTraditional: 失敗的原因是多方面的，需要認真分析。
examplePinyin: Shībài de yuányīn shì duō fāngmiàn de, xūyào rènzhēn fēnxī.
exampleEnglish: The reasons for failure are multifaceted and need to be carefully analyzed.

exampleSimplified: 努力的结果是他考上了理想的大学。
exampleTraditional: 努力的結果是他考上了理想的大學。
examplePinyin: Nǔlì de jiéguǒ shì tā kǎoshàng le lǐxiǎng de dàxué.
exampleEnglish: The result of his hard work was that he got into his ideal university.

exampleSimplified: 她的汉语水平达到了很高的程度。
exampleTraditional: 她的漢語水平達到了很高的程度。
examplePinyin: Tā de hànyǔ shuǐpíng dádào le hěn gāo de chéngdù.
exampleEnglish: Her Chinese language level has reached a very high degree.

exampleSimplified: 这次调查的范围涵盖了全国各地。
exampleTraditional: 這次調查的範圍涵蓋了全國各地。
examplePinyin: Zhè cì diàochá de fànwéi hángài le quánguó gèdì.
exampleEnglish: The scope of this survey covered all parts of the country.

exampleSimplified: 女性在这家公司员工中占的比例越来越高。
exampleTraditional: 女性在這家公司員工中佔的比例越來越高。
examplePinyin: Nǚxìng zài zhè jiā gōngsī yuángōng zhōng zhàn de bǐlì yuèlái yuè gāo.
exampleEnglish: The proportion of women among the employees of this company is getting higher and higher.

exampleSimplified: 这次订单的数量比上次多了一倍。
exampleTraditional: 這次訂單的數量比上次多了一倍。
examplePinyin: Zhè cì dìngdān de shùliàng bǐ shàng cì duō le yī bèi.
exampleEnglish: The quantity of this order is double that of the last time.

exampleSimplified: 这家工厂生产的产品质量很高。
exampleTraditional: 這家工廠生產的產品質量很高。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng shēngchǎn de chǎnpǐn zhìliàng hěn gāo.
exampleEnglish: The products manufactured by this factory are of very high quality.

exampleSimplified: 经济发展的速度超过了预期。
exampleTraditional: 經濟發展的速度超過了預期。
examplePinyin: Jīngjì fāzhǎn de sùdù chāoguò le yùqī.
exampleEnglish: The speed of economic development exceeded expectations.

exampleSimplified: 这款手机有很多实用的功能。
exampleTraditional: 這款手機有很多實用的功能。
examplePinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī yǒu hěn duō shíyòng de gōngnéng.
exampleEnglish: This smartphone has many practical functions.

exampleSimplified: 我们需要建立一个完善的管理系统。
exampleTraditional: 我們需要建立一個完善的管理系統。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen xūyào jiànlì yī gè wánshàn de guǎnlǐ xìtǒng.
exampleEnglish: We need to establish a sound management system.

exampleSimplified: 这座桥的结构非常坚固。
exampleTraditional: 這座橋的結構非常堅固。
examplePinyin: Zhè zuò qiáo de jiégòu fēicháng jiāngù.
exampleEnglish: The structure of this bridge is very solid.

exampleSimplified: 这是一种普遍存在的社会现象。
exampleTraditional: 這是一種普遍存在的社會現象。
examplePinyin: Zhè shì yī zhǒng pǔbiàn cúnzài de shèhuì xiànxiàng.
exampleEnglish: This is a widespread social phenomenon.

exampleSimplified: 这个问题需要各方共同协作来解决。
exampleTraditional: 這個問題需要各方共同協作來解決。
examplePinyin: Zhège wèntí xūyào gè fāng gòngtóng xiézuò lái jiějué.
exampleEnglish: This problem requires all parties to work together to solve.

exampleSimplified: 五星红旗是中国的国家标志。
exampleTraditional: 五星紅旗是中國的國家標誌。
examplePinyin: Wǔxīng hóngqí shì Zhōngguó de guójiā biāozhì.
exampleEnglish: The five-star red flag is a national symbol of China.

exampleSimplified: 白色在很多文化中象征纯洁。
exampleTraditional: 白色在很多文化中象徵純潔。
examplePinyin: Báisè zài hěn duō wénhuà zhōng xiàngzhēng chúnjié.
exampleEnglish: White symbolizes purity in many cultures.

exampleSimplified: 这个概念在哲学中非常重要。
exampleTraditional: 這個概念在哲學中非常重要。
examplePinyin: Zhège gàiniàn zài zhéxué zhōng fēicháng zhòngyào.
exampleEnglish: This concept is very important in philosophy.

exampleSimplified: 我们要看清事物的本质，不被表面现象所迷惑。
exampleTraditional: 我們要看清事物的本質，不被表面現象所迷惑。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào kànqīng shìwù de běnzhì, bù bèi biǎomiàn xiànxiàng suǒ míhuò.
exampleEnglish: We must see the essence of things and not be misled by surface appearances.

exampleSimplified: 健康是一切的前提，没有健康什么都是空谈。
exampleTraditional: 健康是一切的前提，沒有健康什麼都是空談。
examplePinyin: Jiànkāng shì yīqiè de qiántí, méiyǒu jiànkāng shénme dōu shì kōngtán.
exampleEnglish: Health is the precondition for everything; without health, everything is empty talk.

exampleSimplified: 根据最新数据，经济形势有所好转。
exampleTraditional: 根據最新數據，經濟形勢有所好轉。
examplePinyin: Gēnjù zuìxīn shùjù, jīngjì xíngshì yǒusuǒ hǎozhuǎn.
exampleEnglish: Based on the latest data, the economic situation has improved somewhat.

exampleSimplified: 任何决定都应该有充分的依据。
exampleTraditional: 任何決定都應該有充分的依據。
examplePinyin: Rènhé juédìng dōu yīnggāi yǒu chōngfèn de yījù.
exampleEnglish: Any decision should have sufficient basis.

exampleSimplified: 每个人都有自己独特的学习方式。
exampleTraditional: 每個人都有自己獨特的學習方式。
examplePinyin: Měi gè rén dōu yǒu zìjǐ dútè de xuéxí fāngshì.
exampleEnglish: Everyone has their own unique way of learning.

exampleSimplified: 和平谈判是解决争端的最佳手段。
exampleTraditional: 和平談判是解決爭端的最佳手段。
examplePinyin: Hépíng tánpàn shì jiějué zhēngduān de zuìjiā shǒuduàn.
exampleEnglish: Peaceful negotiation is the best means of resolving disputes.

exampleSimplified: 政府采取了有效措施控制疫情。
exampleTraditional: 政府採取了有效措施控制疫情。
examplePinyin: Zhèngfǔ cǎiqǔ le yǒuxiào cuòshī kòngzhì yìqíng.
exampleEnglish: The government took effective measures to control the epidemic.

exampleSimplified: 公司的发展方针是质量第一。
exampleTraditional: 公司的發展方針是質量第一。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī de fāzhǎn fāngzhēn shì zhìliàng dì yī.
exampleEnglish: The company's development guideline is quality first.

english: to cope with; to respond to; to deal with
exampleSimplified: 我们必须做好准备应对各种突发情况。
exampleTraditional: 我們必須做好準備應對各種突發情況。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen bìxū zuòhǎo zhǔnbèi yìngduì gèzhǒng tūfā qíngkuàng.
exampleEnglish: We must be well prepared to deal with various emergencies.

english: to handle; to process; to deal with
exampleSimplified: 这件事需要认真处理，不能马虎。
exampleTraditional: 這件事需要認真處理，不能馬虎。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiàn shì xūyào rènzhēn chǔlǐ, bùnéng mǎhu.
exampleEnglish: This matter needs to be handled seriously and cannot be taken lightly.

exampleSimplified: 老师详细解释了这道难题的解法。
exampleTraditional: 老師詳細解釋了這道難題的解法。
examplePinyin: Lǎoshī xiángxì jiěshì le zhè dào nántí de jiěfǎ.
exampleEnglish: The teacher explained in detail how to solve this difficult problem.

english: to admit; to acknowledge; to recognize
exampleSimplified: 他坦然承认了自己的错误。
exampleTraditional: 他坦然承認了自己的錯誤。
examplePinyin: Tā tǎnrán chéngrèn le zìjǐ de cuòwù.
exampleEnglish: He openly admitted his mistakes.

exampleSimplified: 他否认参与了这件事。
exampleTraditional: 他否認參與了這件事。
examplePinyin: Tā fǒurèn cānyù le zhè jiàn shì.
exampleEnglish: He denied being involved in this matter.

exampleSimplified: 没有充分的证据，不能随意指责别人。
exampleTraditional: 沒有充分的證據，不能隨意指責別人。
examplePinyin: Méiyǒu chōngfèn de zhèngjù, bùnéng suíyì zhǐzé biérén.
exampleEnglish: Without sufficient evidence, you cannot arbitrarily accuse others.

exampleSimplified: 你必须为自己的行为承担后果。
exampleTraditional: 你必須為自己的行為承擔後果。
examplePinyin: Nǐ bìxū wèi zìjǐ de xíngwéi chéngdān hòuguǒ.
exampleEnglish: You must bear the consequences of your own actions.

exampleSimplified: 这位作家在文学界有着广泛的影响力。
exampleTraditional: 這位作家在文學界有著廣泛的影響力。
examplePinyin: Zhè wèi zuòjiā zài wénxuéjiè yǒuzhe guǎngfàn de yǐngxiǎnglì.
exampleEnglish: This writer has extensive influence in the literary world.

exampleSimplified: 他在公司中的地位很高，深受同事尊重。
exampleTraditional: 他在公司中的地位很高，深受同事尊重。
examplePinyin: Tā zài gōngsī zhōng de dìwèi hěn gāo, shēn shòu tóngshì zūnzhòng.
exampleEnglish: He holds a high position in the company and is deeply respected by his colleagues.

exampleSimplified: 这家公司的员工待遇非常好。
exampleTraditional: 這家公司的員工待遇非常好。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī de yuángōng dàiyù fēicháng hǎo.
exampleEnglish: This company's employee benefits and treatment are very good.

exampleSimplified: 要善于把握每一次学习的机会。
exampleTraditional: 要善於把握每一次學習的機會。
examplePinyin: Yào shànyú bǎwò měi yī cì xuéxí de jīhuì.
exampleEnglish: One should be good at seizing every opportunity to learn.

exampleSimplified: 选择一个合适的职业对人生非常重要。
exampleTraditional: 選擇一個合適的職業對人生非常重要。
examplePinyin: Xuǎnzé yī gè héshì de zhíyè duì rénshēng fēicháng zhòngyào.
exampleEnglish: Choosing an appropriate career is very important for one's life.

exampleSimplified: 每个员工都要认真对待自己的岗位。
exampleTraditional: 每個員工都要認真對待自己的崗位。
examplePinyin: Měi gè yuángōng dōu yào rènzhēn duìdài zìjǐ de gǎngwèi.
exampleEnglish: Every employee must take their position seriously.

exampleSimplified: 他的薪水比同行业的平均水平要高。
exampleTraditional: 他的薪水比同行業的平均水平要高。
examplePinyin: Tā de xīnshuǐ bǐ tóng hángyè de píngjūn shuǐpíng yào gāo.
exampleEnglish: His salary is higher than the industry average.

exampleSimplified: 劳动是创造财富的源泉。
exampleTraditional: 勞動是創造財富的源泉。
examplePinyin: Láodòng shì chuàngzào cáifù de yuánquán.
exampleEnglish: Labor is the source of creating wealth.

exampleSimplified: 大学毕业后，他很快就找到了就业机会。
exampleTraditional: 大學畢業後，他很快就找到了就業機會。
examplePinyin: Dàxué bìyè hòu, tā hěn kuài jiù zhǎodào le jiùyè jīhuì.
exampleEnglish: After graduating from university, he quickly found employment.

exampleSimplified: 经济危机导致大量工人失业。
exampleTraditional: 經濟危機導致大量工人失業。
examplePinyin: Jīngjì wēijī dǎozhì dàliàng gōngrén shīyè.
exampleEnglish: The economic crisis caused a large number of workers to lose their jobs.

exampleSimplified: 公司正在招聘有经验的工程师。
exampleTraditional: 公司正在招聘有經驗的工程師。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài zhāopìn yǒu jīngyàn de gōngchéngshī.
exampleEnglish: The company is recruiting experienced engineers.

exampleSimplified: 新员工入职前需要接受专业培训。
exampleTraditional: 新員工入職前需要接受專業培訓。
examplePinyin: Xīn yuángōng rùzhí qián xūyào jiēshòu zhuānyè péixùn.
exampleEnglish: New employees need to undergo professional training before starting work.

exampleSimplified: 他凭借出色的业绩获得了晋升。
exampleTraditional: 他憑藉出色的業績獲得了晉升。
examplePinyin: Tā píngjiè chūsè de yèjī huòdé le jìnshēng.
exampleEnglish: He was promoted based on his outstanding performance.

exampleSimplified: 年底会根据绩效发放奖金。
exampleTraditional: 年底會根據績效發放獎金。
examplePinyin: Niándǐ huì gēnjù jìxiào fāfàng jiǎngjīn.
exampleEnglish: Bonuses will be distributed at the end of the year based on performance.

exampleSimplified: 所有的商业行为都必须是合法的。
exampleTraditional: 所有的商業行為都必須是合法的。
examplePinyin: Suǒyǒu de shāngyè xíngwéi dōu bìxū shì héfǎ de.
exampleEnglish: All business activities must be legal.

english: illegal; unlawful; to violate the law
exampleSimplified: 违法行为必须受到法律的制裁。
exampleTraditional: 違法行為必須受到法律的制裁。
examplePinyin: Wéifǎ xíngwéi bìxū shòudào fǎlǜ de zhìcái.
exampleEnglish: Illegal behavior must be subject to legal sanctions.

exampleSimplified: 违规者将受到相应的处罚。
exampleTraditional: 違規者將受到相應的處罰。
examplePinyin: Wéiguī zhě jiāng shòudào xiāngyìng de chǔfá.
exampleEnglish: Violators will receive corresponding punishments.

exampleSimplified: 为了鼓励创新，公司设立了奖励机制。
exampleTraditional: 為了鼓勵創新，公司設立了獎勵機制。
examplePinyin: Wèile gǔlì chuàngxīn, gōngsī shèlì le jiǎnglì jīzhì.
exampleEnglish: To encourage innovation, the company established a reward mechanism.

exampleSimplified: 双方通过协商解决了这起纠纷。
exampleTraditional: 雙方通過協商解決了這起糾紛。
examplePinyin: Shuāngfāng tōngguò xiéshāng jiějué le zhè qǐ jiūfēn.
exampleEnglish: Both parties resolved this dispute through negotiation.

english: to complain; to lodge a complaint
exampleSimplified: 顾客对产品质量进行了投诉。
exampleTraditional: 顧客對產品質量進行了投訴。
examplePinyin: Gùkè duì chǎnpǐn zhìliàng jìnxíng le tóusù.
exampleEnglish: The customer lodged a complaint about the product quality.

exampleSimplified: 他提交了大学奖学金的申请。
exampleTraditional: 他提交了大學獎學金的申請。
examplePinyin: Tā tíjiāo le dàxué jiǎngxuéjīn de shēnqǐng.
exampleEnglish: He submitted an application for a university scholarship.

exampleSimplified: 这个项目已经通过了政府的审批。
exampleTraditional: 這個項目已經通過了政府的審批。
examplePinyin: Zhège xiàngmù yǐjīng tōngguò le zhèngfǔ de shěnpī.
exampleEnglish: This project has already received government approval.

exampleSimplified: 董事会批准了这项重大投资计划。
exampleTraditional: 董事會批准了這項重大投資計劃。
examplePinyin: Dǒngshìhuì pīzhǔn le zhè xiàng zhòngdà tóuzī jìhuà.
exampleEnglish: The board of directors approved this major investment plan.

exampleSimplified: 公司发布了关于人事变动的公告。
exampleTraditional: 公司發布了關於人事變動的公告。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī fābù le guānyú rénshì biàndòng de gōnggào.
exampleEnglish: The company issued an announcement about personnel changes.

exampleSimplified: 请提前通知我，这样我可以做好准备。
exampleTraditional: 請提前通知我，這樣我可以做好準備。
examplePinyin: Qǐng tíqián tōngzhī wǒ, zhèyàng wǒ kěyǐ zuòhǎo zhǔnbèi.
exampleEnglish: Please notify me in advance so I can be prepared.

exampleSimplified: 记者对这次事件进行了详细报道。
exampleTraditional: 記者對這次事件進行了詳細報道。
examplePinyin: Jìzhě duì zhè cì shìjiàn jìnxíng le xiángxì bàodào.
exampleEnglish: The journalist made a detailed report on this event.

exampleSimplified: 社交媒体已经成为信息传播的重要渠道。
exampleTraditional: 社交媒體已經成為信息傳播的重要渠道。
examplePinyin: Shèjiāo méitǐ yǐjīng chéngwéi xìnxī chuánbō de zhòngyào qúdào.
exampleEnglish: Social media has become an important channel for information dissemination.

exampleSimplified: 这件事引发了强烈的社会舆论。
exampleTraditional: 這件事引發了強烈的社會輿論。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yǐnfā le qiángliè de shèhuì yúlùn.
exampleEnglish: This matter triggered strong public opinion.

exampleSimplified: 这本书获得了众多读者的积极评论。
exampleTraditional: 這本書獲得了眾多讀者的積極評論。
examplePinyin: Zhè běn shū huòdé le zhòngduō dúzhě de jījí pínglùn.
exampleEnglish: This book received positive comments from many readers.

exampleSimplified: 这家公司在电视上投放了大量广告。
exampleTraditional: 這家公司在電視上投放了大量廣告。
examplePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zài diànshì shàng tóufàng le dàliàng guǎnggào.
exampleEnglish: This company placed a large number of advertisements on television.

exampleSimplified: 我们需要加强对这项政策的宣传力度。
exampleTraditional: 我們需要加強對這項政策的宣傳力度。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen xūyào jiāqiáng duì zhè xiàng zhèngcè de xuānchuán lìdù.
exampleEnglish: We need to strengthen the publicity efforts for this policy.

exampleSimplified: 她的新书即将出版。
exampleTraditional: 她的新書即將出版。
examplePinyin: Tā de xīn shū jíjiāng chūbǎn.
exampleEnglish: Her new book is about to be published.

exampleSimplified: 未经授权擅自复制受版权保护的内容是违法的。
exampleTraditional: 未經授權擅自複製受版權保護的內容是違法的。
examplePinyin: Wèi jīng shòuquán shànzì fùzhì shòu bǎnquán bǎohù de nèiróng shì wéifǎ de.
exampleEnglish: Reproducing copyright-protected content without authorization is illegal.

exampleSimplified: 这位画家的作品在世界各地展出。
exampleTraditional: 這位畫家的作品在世界各地展出。
examplePinyin: Zhè wèi huàjiā de zuòpǐn zài shìjiè gèdì zhǎnchū.
exampleEnglish: This painter's works are exhibited all over the world.

exampleSimplified: 这部电影以历史为题材，讲述了一段感人的故事。
exampleTraditional: 這部電影以歷史為題材，講述了一段感人的故事。
examplePinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yǐ lìshǐ wéi tícái, jiǎngshù le yī duàn gǎnrén de gùshi.
exampleEnglish: This film takes history as its theme and tells a touching story.

exampleSimplified: 这位作曲家有着独特的音乐风格。
exampleTraditional: 這位作曲家有著獨特的音樂風格。
examplePinyin: Zhè wèi zuòqǔjiā yǒuzhe dútè de yīnyuè fēnggé.
exampleEnglish: This composer has a unique musical style.

english: to appreciate; to enjoy; to admire
exampleSimplified: 他非常欣赏这幅画的构图和色彩。
exampleTraditional: 他非常欣賞這幅畫的構圖和色彩。
examplePinyin: Tā fēicháng xīnshǎng zhè fú huà de gòutú hé sècǎi.
exampleEnglish: He greatly appreciates the composition and colors of this painting.

english: to be grateful; to appreciate; gratitude
exampleSimplified: 她对老师的帮助感激不尽。
exampleTraditional: 她對老師的幫助感激不盡。
examplePinyin: Tā duì lǎoshī de bāngzhù gǎnjī bùjìn.
exampleEnglish: She is deeply grateful for the teacher's help.

english: to worship; to adore; to idolize
exampleSimplified: 他非常崇拜那位科学家，把他当作人生偶像。
exampleTraditional: 他非常崇拜那位科學家，把他當作人生偶像。
examplePinyin: Tā fēicháng chóngbài nà wèi kēxuéjiā, bǎ tā dàngzuò rénshēng ǒuxiàng.
exampleEnglish: He greatly admires that scientist and regards him as his life idol.

english: to envy; to be jealous; jealousy
exampleSimplified: 他对同事的成功感到嫉妒。
exampleTraditional: 他對同事的成功感到嫉妒。
examplePinyin: Tā duì tóngshì de chénggōng gǎndào jídù.
exampleEnglish: He felt jealous of his colleague's success.

exampleSimplified: 宽容是一种美德，我们要学会原谅别人。
exampleTraditional: 寬容是一種美德，我們要學會原諒別人。
examplePinyin: Kuānróng shì yī zhǒng měidé, wǒmen yào xuéhuì yuánliàng biérén.
exampleEnglish: Tolerance is a virtue; we should learn to forgive others.

exampleSimplified: 她对那些处境困难的人充满了同情。
exampleTraditional: 她對那些處境困難的人充滿了同情。
examplePinyin: Tā duì nàxiē chǔjìng kùnnán de rén chōngmǎn le tóngqíng.
exampleEnglish: She is full of sympathy for those in difficult situations.

exampleSimplified: 为自己的国家感到骄傲是很正常的。
exampleTraditional: 為自己的國家感到驕傲是很正常的。
examplePinyin: Wèi zìjǐ de guójiā gǎndào jiāo'ào shì hěn zhèngcháng de.
exampleEnglish: It is very normal to feel proud of one's country.

exampleSimplified: 谦虚是一种值得尊重的品格。
exampleTraditional: 謙虛是一種值得尊重的品格。
examplePinyin: Qiānxū shì yī zhǒng zhídé zūnzhòng de pǐngé.
exampleEnglish: Modesty is a quality worthy of respect.

exampleSimplified: 面对困难需要勇气和智慧。
exampleTraditional: 面對困難需要勇氣和智慧。
examplePinyin: Miànduì kùnnán xūyào yǒngqì hé zhìhuì.
exampleEnglish: Facing difficulties requires courage and wisdom.

exampleSimplified: 教育孩子需要极大的耐心。
exampleTraditional: 教育孩子需要極大的耐心。
examplePinyin: Jiàoyù háizi xūyào jídà de nàixīn.
exampleEnglish: Educating children requires enormous patience.

exampleSimplified: 成功需要毅力和坚持不懈的努力。
exampleTraditional: 成功需要毅力和堅持不懈的努力。
examplePinyin: Chénggōng xūyào yìlì hé jiānchí bùxiè de nǔlì.
exampleEnglish: Success requires perseverance and unrelenting effort.

exampleSimplified: 自信是成功的第一步。
exampleTraditional: 自信是成功的第一步。
examplePinyin: Zìxìn shì chénggōng de dì yī bù.
exampleEnglish: Self-confidence is the first step to success.

exampleSimplified: 他有很强的责任感，总是认真完成工作。
exampleTraditional: 他有很強的責任感，總是認真完成工作。
examplePinyin: Tā yǒu hěn qiáng de zérèngǎn, zǒngshì rènzhēn wánchéng gōngzuò.
exampleEnglish: He has a strong sense of responsibility and always completes his work seriously.

english: to dedicate; to devote; contribution; dedication
exampleSimplified: 她把一生奉献给了教育事业。
exampleTraditional: 她把一生奉獻給了教育事業。
examplePinyin: Tā bǎ yīshēng fèngxiàn gěi le jiàoyù shìyè.
exampleEnglish: She dedicated her whole life to the cause of education.

exampleSimplified: 他慷慨地捐出了自己的积蓄帮助贫困儿童。
exampleTraditional: 他慷慨地捐出了自己的積蓄幫助貧困兒童。
examplePinyin: Tā kāngkǎi de juānchū le zìjǐ de jīxù bāngzhù pínkùn értóng.
exampleEnglish: He generously donated his savings to help impoverished children.

exampleSimplified: 她是一个善良的人，总是乐于帮助他人。
exampleTraditional: 她是一個善良的人，總是樂於幫助他人。
examplePinyin: Tā shì yī gè shànliáng de rén, zǒngshì lèyú bāngzhù tārén.
exampleEnglish: She is a kind person who is always willing to help others.

exampleSimplified: 诚实是做人的基本品质。
exampleTraditional: 誠實是做人的基本品質。
examplePinyin: Chéngshí shì zuòrén de jīběn pǐnzhì.
exampleEnglish: Honesty is a fundamental quality of being a person.

exampleSimplified: 他对公司忠诚，从未想过离开。
exampleTraditional: 他對公司忠誠，從未想過離開。
examplePinyin: Tā duì gōngsī zhōngchéng, cóng wèi xiǎngguò líkāi.
exampleEnglish: He is loyal to the company and has never thought of leaving.

exampleSimplified: 她的成功源于她勤奋的态度。
exampleTraditional: 她的成功源於她勤奮的態度。
examplePinyin: Tā de chénggōng yuányú tā qínfèn de tàidu.
exampleEnglish: Her success stems from her diligent attitude.

exampleSimplified: 这个孩子非常聪明，学什么都很快。
exampleTraditional: 這個孩子非常聰明，學什麼都很快。
examplePinyin: Zhège háizi fēicháng cōngming, xué shénme dōu hěn kuài.
exampleEnglish: This child is very smart and learns everything quickly.

exampleSimplified: 面对突发情况，他沉着冷静，处理得当。
exampleTraditional: 面對突發情況，他沉著冷靜，處理得當。
examplePinyin: Miànduì tūfā qíngkuàng, tā chénzhuó lěngjìng, chǔlǐ dédàng.
exampleEnglish: When facing an emergency, he remained calm and composed and handled it appropriately.

english: excited; agitated; to excite; to move
exampleSimplified: 听到这个好消息，他激动得热泪盈眶。
exampleTraditional: 聽到這個好消息，他激動得熱淚盈眶。
examplePinyin: Tīng dào zhège hǎo xiāoxi, tā jīdòng de rè lèi yíng kuàng.
exampleEnglish: Hearing this good news, he was so excited that tears welled up in his eyes.

exampleSimplified: 即使在最困难的时候，也不要绝望。
exampleTraditional: 即使在最困難的時候，也不要絕望。
examplePinyin: Jíshǐ zài zuì kùnnán de shíhou, yě bùyào juéwàng.
exampleEnglish: Even in the most difficult times, do not despair.

exampleSimplified: 考试没考好，他非常失望。
exampleTraditional: 考試沒考好，他非常失望。
examplePinyin: Kǎoshì méi kǎo hǎo, tā fēicháng shīwàng.
exampleEnglish: He was very disappointed that the exam did not go well.

exampleSimplified: 他希望有一天能环游世界。
exampleTraditional: 他希望有一天能環遊世界。
examplePinyin: Tā xīwàng yǒu yītiān néng huányóu shìjiè.
exampleEnglish: He hopes to travel around the world someday.

exampleSimplified: 她非常担心孩子一个人在家。
exampleTraditional: 她非常擔心孩子一個人在家。
examplePinyin: Tā fēicháng dānxīn háizi yī gè rén zài jiā.
exampleEnglish: She is very worried about the child being home alone.

exampleSimplified: 考试前他非常紧张，晚上睡不着觉。
exampleTraditional: 考試前他非常緊張，晚上睡不著覺。
examplePinyin: Kǎoshì qián tā fēicháng jǐnzhāng, wǎnshang shuì bù zháo jiào.
exampleEnglish: Before the exam, he was very nervous and couldn't sleep at night.

exampleSimplified: 听说要去旅行，孩子们都非常兴奋。
exampleTraditional: 聽說要去旅行，孩子們都非常興奮。
examplePinyin: Tīng shuō yào qù lǚxíng, háizimen dōu fēicháng xīngfèn.
exampleEnglish: Upon hearing they were going on a trip, the children were all very excited.

exampleSimplified: 他为工作上的事情感到很烦恼。
exampleTraditional: 他為工作上的事情感到很煩惱。
examplePinyin: Tā wèi gōngzuò shàng de shìqing gǎndào hěn fánnǎo.
exampleEnglish: He was very troubled by matters at work.

exampleSimplified: 他后悔没有早点抓住这个机会。
exampleTraditional: 他後悔沒有早點抓住這個機會。
examplePinyin: Tā hòuhuǐ méiyǒu zǎodiǎn zhuāzhù zhège jīhuì.

exampleSimplified: 没能去看那场音乐会，真是遗憾。
exampleTraditional: 沒能去看那場音樂會，真是遺憾。
examplePinyin: Méi néng qù kàn nà chǎng yīnyuèhuì, zhēn shì yíhàn.
exampleEnglish: It's really a pity that I couldn't go to that concert.

exampleSimplified: 他对高处有一种莫名的恐惧。
exampleTraditional: 他對高處有一種莫名的恐懼。
examplePinyin: Tā duì gāochù yǒu yī zhǒng mòmíng de kǒngjù.
exampleEnglish: He has an inexplicable fear of heights.

exampleSimplified: 一个人在异乡生活，有时会感到孤独。
exampleTraditional: 一個人在異鄉生活，有時會感到孤獨。
examplePinyin: Yī gè rén zài yìxiāng shēnghuó, yǒushí huì gǎndào gūdú.
exampleEnglish: Living alone in a foreign place, one sometimes feels lonely.

exampleSimplified: 家人的健康是他最大的幸福。
exampleTraditional: 家人的健康是他最大的幸福。
examplePinyin: Jiārén de jiànkāng shì tā zuìdà de xìngfú.
exampleEnglish: The health of his family is his greatest happiness.

exampleSimplified: 失去亲人带来的痛苦是难以言说的。
exampleTraditional: 失去親人帶來的痛苦是難以言說的。

exampleEnglish: The pain of losing a loved one is indescribable.

exampleSimplified: 听到这个消息，她感到非常悲伤。
exampleTraditional: 聽到這個消息，她感到非常悲傷。
examplePinyin: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, tā gǎndào fēicháng bēishāng.
exampleEnglish: Upon hearing the news, she felt very sad.

exampleSimplified: 分享是带来快乐的最好方式之一。
exampleTraditional: 分享是帶來快樂的最好方式之一。
examplePinyin: Fēnxiǎng shì dài lái kuàilè de zuìhǎo fāngshì zhī yī.
exampleEnglish: Sharing is one of the best ways to bring happiness.

exampleSimplified: 大自然的美景让他的内心感到平静。
exampleTraditional: 大自然的美景讓他的內心感到平靜。
examplePinyin: Dà zìrán de měijǐng ràng tā de nèixīn gǎndào píngjìng.
exampleEnglish: The beautiful scenery of nature brought peace to his heart.

exampleSimplified: 顾客对这次服务非常满意。
exampleTraditional: 顧客對這次服務非常滿意。
examplePinyin: Gùkè duì zhè cì fúwù fēicháng mǎnyì.

exampleSimplified: 经过多年的历练，他变得更加成熟稳重。
exampleTraditional: 經過多年的歷練，他變得更加成熟穩重。

exampleSimplified: 她的性格单纯，很容易相信别人。
exampleTraditional: 她的性格單純，很容易相信別人。

exampleSimplified: 人际关系有时候非常复杂，难以处理。
exampleTraditional: 人際關係有時候非常複雜，難以處理。

exampleSimplified: 这次经历给他留下了深刻的印象。
exampleTraditional: 這次經歷給他留下了深刻的印象。
examplePinyin: Zhè cì jīnglì gěi tā liúxià le shēnkè de yìnxiàng.

exampleTraditional: 他的知識面非常廣闊。

exampleTraditional: 創業的道路十分艱難，但他沒有放棄。

exampleSimplified: 希望你的旅行一切顺利。
exampleTraditional: 希望你的旅行一切順利。

exampleEnglish: I hope your trip goes smoothly.
